Members (Use Secure RPC to bypass RLS recursion limits)\r\n            const { data: membersData, error: membersError } = await supabase\r\n                .rpc('get_organization_members_secure', { \r\n                    p_org_id: currentOrganization.id \r\n                });\r\n            \r\n            if (membersError) throw membersError;\r\n\r\n            // RPC returns flattened structure, map correctly to UI state\r\n            setMembers(membersData?.map((m: any) => ({\r\n                user_id: m.user_id,\r\n                role_id: m.role_id,\r\n                status: m.status,\r\n                joined_at: m.joined_at,\r\n                role_name: m.organization_roles?.name || 'Unknown',\r\n                role: m.organization_roles,\r\n                profiles: m.profiles,\r\n                user: {\r\n                    id: m.user_id,\r\n                    ...m.profiles\r\n                }\r\n            })) as unknown as OrganizationUser[] || []);\r\n\r\n            // 2. Invites\r\n            setInvites(await OrganizationService.getPendingInvites(currentOrganization.id));\r\n\r\n            // 3. Roles\r\n            const rolesData = await OrganizationService.getRoles(currentOrganization.id);\r\n            // Sort by priority (asc means higher power usually, so Owner=0 is top)\r\n            setRoles(rolesData.sort((a, b) => a.priority - b.priority));\r\n            \r\n            if (rolesData.length > 0 && !selectedRoleId) {\r\n                const memberRole = rolesData.find((r) => r.name === 'Member');\r\n                setSelectedRoleId(memberRole ? memberRole.id : rolesData[0].id);\r\n            }\r\n\r\n            // 4. Permissions (Master List)\r\n            const allPerms = await OrganizationService.getAllPermissions(); // Service handles sorting\r\n            setPermissions(allPerms);\r\n\r\n            // 5. Role Permissions (Pivot)\r\n            const { data: rpData } = await supabase\r\n                .from('role_permissions')\r\n                .select('role_id, permission_id')\r\n                .in('role_id', rolesData.map(r => r.id));\r\n            \r\n            const map: Record<string, string[]> = {};\r\n            rolesData.forEach(r => map[r.id] = []);\r\n            rpData?.forEach((rp) => {\r\n                if (map[rp.role_id]) map[rp.role_id].push(rp.permission_id);\r\n            });\r\n            setRolePermissionsMap(map);\r\n\r\n            // 6. Teams (Phase 6)\r\n            const teamsData = await OrganizationService.getTeams(currentOrganization.id);\r\n            setTeams(teamsData);\r\n\r\n        } catch (e) {\r\n            console.error(e);\r\n        } finally {\r\n            setIsLoading(false);\r\n        }\r\n    }, [currentOrganization, selectedRoleId]);\r\n\r\n    // Fetch team members when a team is selected\r\n    useEffect(() => {\r\n        if (selectedTeam) {\r\n            OrganizationService.getTeamMembers(selectedTeam.id).then(setSelectedTeamMembers);\r\n        } else {\r\n            setSelectedTeamMembers([]);\r\n        }\r\n    }, [selectedTeam]);\r\n\r\n    useEffect(() => {\r\n        if (open && currentOrganization) {\r\n            fetchData();\r\n        }\r\n    }, [open, currentOrganization, fetchData]);\r\n\r\n    // --- Actions ---\r\n\r\n    const handleInvite = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\r\n        e.preventDefault();\r\n        if (!inviteEmail || !selectedRoleId || !currentOrganization) return;\r\n        if (!inviteEmail.includes('@')) { toast.error(\"Invalid email\"); return; }\r\n\r\n        try {\r\n            setIsLoading(true);\r\n            const token = await OrganizationService.inviteMember(currentOrganization.id, inviteEmail, selectedRoleId);\r\n            \r\n            // Clipboard Copy for Phase 2\r\n            const inviteLink = `${window.location.origin}/join?token=${token}`;\r\n            navigator.clipboard.writeText(inviteLink);\r\n            toast.success(`Invitation generated! Link copied to clipboard.`);\r\n\r\n            setInviteEmail('');\r\n            fetchData(); \r\n        } catch (error) {\r\n            toast.error((error as Error).message || \"Failed to send invite\");\r\n        } finally {\r\n            setIsLoading(false);\r\n        }\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    const handleRevoke = async (inviteId: string) => {\r\n        try {\r\n            await OrganizationService.revokeInvite(inviteId);\r\n            toast.success(\"Invitation revoked\");\r\n            fetchData();\r\n        } catch (error) {\r\n            toast.error(\"Failed to revoke\");\r\n        }\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    const handleRemoveMember = async (userId: string) => {\r\n        if (!confirm('Remove this member?')) return;\r\n        try { await removeMember(userId); fetchData(); } catch {}\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    const handleCreateRole = async () => {\r\n        if (!newRoleName || !currentOrganization) return;\r\n        try {\r\n            setIsLoading(true);\r\n            await OrganizationService.createRole(currentOrganization.id, newRoleName, newRolePriority[0]);\r\n            toast.success(\"Role created successfully\");\r\n            setNewRoleName('');\r\n            setIsCreatingRole(false);\r\n            fetchData();\r\n        } catch (error) {\r\n            toast.error((error as Error).message || \"Failed to create role\");\r\n        } finally {\r\n            setIsLoading(false);\r\n        }\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    const handleDeleteRole = async (roleId: string) => {\r\n        if (!confirm('Are you sure? This action cannot be undone.')) return;\r\n        try {\r\n            await OrganizationService.deleteRole(roleId);\r\n            toast.success(\"Role deleted\");\r\n            fetchData();\r\n            if (selectedRoleForEdit?.id === roleId) setSelectedRoleForEdit(null);\r\n        } catch (error) {\r\n            toast.error((error as Error).message || \"Failed to delete role\");\r\n        }\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    const handlePermissionToggle = async (roleId: string, permId: string, isChecked: boolean) => {\r\n        // Optimistic UI\r\n        const currentPerms = rolePermissionsMap[roleId] || [];\r\n        const newPerms = isChecked \r\n            ? [...currentPerms, permId]\r\n            : currentPerms.filter(id => id !== permId);\r\n        \r\n        setRolePermissionsMap(prev => ({ ...prev, [roleId]: newPerms }));\r\n\r\n        try {\r\n            await OrganizationService.updateRolePermissions(roleId, newPerms);\r\n        } catch (error) {\r\n            toast.error(\"Failed to update permission\");\r\n            // Revert on error\r\n            setRolePermissionsMap(prev => ({ ...prev, [roleId]: currentPerms }));\r\n        }\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    const handleCreateTeam = async () => {\r\n        if (!newTeamName || !currentOrganization) return;\r\n        try {\r\n            setIsLoading(true);\r\n            const team = await OrganizationService.createTeam(currentOrganization.id, newTeamName);\r\n            toast.success(\"Team created\");\r\n            setNewTeamName('');\r\n            setIsCreatingTeam(false);\r\n            setTeams(prev => [...prev, { ...team, members_count: 0 }]); // Optimistic add\r\n            fetchData(); // Refresh to be safe\r\n        } catch (error) {\r\n            toast.error(\"Failed to create team\");\r\n        } finally {\r\n            setIsLoading(false);\r\n        }\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    const handleAddTeamMember = async () => {\r\n        if (!selectedTeam || !addMemberToTeamId) return;\r\n        try {\r\n            await OrganizationService.addTeamMember(selectedTeam.id, addMemberToTeamId);\r\n            toast.success(\"Member added to team\");\r\n            // Refresh detailed list\r\n            const updatedMembers = await OrganizationService.getTeamMembers(selectedTeam.id);\r\n            setSelectedTeamMembers(updatedMembers);\r\n            // Refresh counts\r\n            fetchData();\r\n        } catch (error) {\r\n            toast.error(\"Failed to add member\");\r\n        }\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    const handleRemoveTeamMember = async (userId: string) => {\r\n        if (!selectedTeam) return;\r\n        try {\r\n            await OrganizationService.removeTeamMember(selectedTeam.id, userId);\r\n            toast.success(\"Member removed from team\");\r\n            const updatedMembers = await OrganizationService.getTeamMembers(selectedTeam.id);\r\n            setSelectedTeamMembers(updatedMembers);\r\n            fetchData();\r\n        } catch (error) {\r\n            toast.error(\"Failed to remove member\");\r\n        }\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    if (!currentOrganization) return null;\r\n\r\n    return (\r\n        <Dialog open={open} onOpenChange={onOpenChange}>\r\n            <DialogContent className=\"sm:max-w-[800px] bg-[#0c1016] border border-white/10 rounded-[2.5rem] p-0 overflow-hidden shadow-2xl h-[700px] flex flex-col\">\r\n                <div className=\"p-8 border-b border-white/5 bg-gradient-to-b from-white/[0.02] to-transparent shrink-0\">\r\n                    <DialogHeader>\r\n                        <div className=\"flex items-center gap-4 mb-2\">\r\n                             <div className=\"w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl bg-indigo-500/10 border border-indigo-500/20 flex items-center justify-center\">\r\n                                 <ShieldCheck className=\"w-6 h-6 text-indigo-400\" />\r\n                             </div>\r\n                             <div>\r\n                                <DialogTitle className=\"text-2xl font-black uppercase tracking-tighter text-white\">{currentOrganization.name}</DialogTitle>\r\n                                <DialogDescription className=\"text-white/40 font-medium text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-widest\">\r\n                                    Organization Management\r\n                                </DialogDescription>\r\n                             </div>\r\n                        </div>\r\n                    </DialogHeader>\r\n                </div>\r\n\r\n                <div className=\"flex-1 overflow-hidden flex flex-col\">\r\n                    <Tabs defaultValue=\"members\" value={activeTab} onValueChange={setActiveTab} className=\"flex-1 flex flex-col\">\r\n                        <div className=\"px-8 pt-6\">\r\n                            <TabsList className=\"bg-white/5 border border-white/5 rounded-xl p-1 w-full h-auto\">\r\n                                <TabsTrigger value=\"members\" className=\"flex-1 h-10 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider data-[state=active]:bg-indigo-500 data-[state=active]:text-white transition-all\">\r\n                                    Members\r\n                                </TabsTrigger>\r\n                                <TabsTrigger value=\"invites\" className=\"flex-1 h-10 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider data-[state=active]:bg-indigo-500 data-[state=active]:text-white transition-all\">\r\n                                    Invites\r\n                                </TabsTrigger>\r\n                                <TabsTrigger value=\"roles\" className=\"flex-1 h-10 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider data-[state=active]:bg-indigo-500 data-[state=active]:text-white transition-all\">\r\n                                    Roles & Permissions\r\n                                </TabsTrigger>\r\n                                <TabsTrigger value=\"teams\" className=\"flex-1 h-10 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider data-[state=active]:bg-indigo-500 data-[state=active]:text-white transition-all\">\r\n                                    Teams & Groups\r\n                                </TabsTrigger>\r\n                            </TabsList>\r\n                        </div>\r\n\r\n                        {/* MEMBERS TAB */}\r\n                        <TabsContent value=\"members\" className=\"flex-1 overflow-hidden p-0 m-0 data-[state=active]:flex flex-col\">\r\n                            <div className=\"p-8 overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar flex-1\">\r\n                                <div className=\"space-y-2\">\r\n                                    {members.map((member) => (\r\n                                        <div key={member.user_id} className=\"flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-white/[0.02] border border-white/5 rounded-2xl\">\r\n                                            <div className=\"flex items-center gap-4\">\r\n                                                <div className=\"w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-white/5 flex items-center justify-center text-white/40\"><User className=\"w-5 h-5\"/></div>\r\n                                                <div>\r\n                                                    <p className=\"font-bold text-sm text-white\">{member.profiles?.display_name || 'Unknown'}</p>\r\n                                                    <p className=\"text-[10px] text-white/30 font-mono\">ID: {member.user_id.slice(0,8)}...</p>\r\n                                                </div>\r\n                                            </div>\r\n                                            <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3\">\r\n                                                <span className=\"text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-2 py-1 rounded-lg border border-white/10 text-white/50\">{member.role_name}</span>\r\n                                                <Button variant=\"ghost\" size=\"icon\" className=\"h-8 w-8 text-white/20 hover:text-red-400\" onClick={() => handleRemoveMember(member.user_id)}><Trash2 className=\"w-4 h-4\" /></Button>\r\n                                            </div>\r\n                                        </div>\r\n                                    ))}\r\n                                </div>\r\n                            </div>\r\n                        </TabsContent>\r\n\r\n                        {/* INVITES TAB */}\r\n                        <TabsContent value=\"invites\" className=\"flex-1 overflow-hidden p-0 m-0 data-[state=active]:flex flex-col\">\r\n                            <div className=\"p-8 overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar flex-1 space-y-8\">\r\n                                <div className=\"space-y-4 bg-white/[0.02] border border-white/5 p-6 rounded-3xl\">\r\n                                    <Label className=\"text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-indigo-400 pl-1 flex items-center gap-2\"><UserPlus className=\"w-3 h-3\" /> Execute Invitation</Label>\r\n                                    <form onSubmit={handleInvite} className=\"gap-3 flex flex-col md:flex-row\">\r\n                                        <div className=\"flex-1 space-y-2\">\r\n                                            <Input placeholder=\"agent@example.com\" value={inviteEmail} onChange={(e) => setInviteEmail(e.target.value)} className=\"h-12 bg-white/5 border-white/10 rounded-xl text-white focus:border-indigo-500/50\" />\r\n                                        </div>\r\n                                        <Select value={selectedRoleId} onValueChange={setSelectedRoleId}>\r\n                                            <SelectTrigger className=\"w-[180px] h-12 bg-white/5 border-white/10 rounded-xl text-white\"><SelectValue placeholder=\"Select Role\" /></SelectTrigger>\r\n                                            <SelectContent className=\"bg-[#1a1d24] border-white/10 text-white\">\r\n                                                {roles.map(r => <SelectItem key={r.id} value={r.id}>{r.name}</SelectItem>)}\r\n                                            </SelectContent>\r\n                                        </Select>\r\n                                        <Button type=\"submit\" disabled={isLoading || !inviteEmail} className=\"h-12 px-6 bg-white text-black hover:bg-indigo-50 rounded-xl font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-[10px]\">{isLoading ? 'Sending...' : 'Invite'}</Button>\r\n                                    </form>\r\n                                </div>\r\n                                <div className=\"space-y-2\">\r\n                                    {invites.map((invite) => (\r\n                                        <div key={invite.id} className=\"flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-white/[0.02] border border-white/5 rounded-2xl\">\r\n                                            <div>\r\n                                                <p className=\"font-bold text-sm text-white\">{invite.email}</p>\r\n                                                <span className=\"text-[9px] bg-white/5 text-white/50 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded uppercase font-bold\">{(invite as any).role?.name || 'Unknown'}</span>\r\n                                            </div>\r\n                                            <Button variant=\"ghost\" size=\"sm\" onClick={() => handleRevoke(invite.id)} className=\"text-red-400 hover:text-red-300\">Revoke</Button>\r\n                                        </div>\r\n                                    ))}\r\n                                </div>\r\n                            </div>\r\n                        </TabsContent>\r\n\r\n                        {/* ROLES TAB (Enterprise Matrix) */}\r\n                        <TabsContent value=\"roles\" className=\"flex-1 overflow-hidden p-0 m-0 data-[state=active]:flex\">\r\n                            {/* ... Content of roles tab stays same ... */}\r\n                            <div className=\"flex w-full h-full\">\r\n                                {/* Left: Roles List */}\r\n                                <div className=\"w-1/3 border-r border-white/5 p-6 flex flex-col gap-4 overflow-y-auto\">\r\n                                    <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between\">\r\n                                        <h4 className=\"text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-white/40\">Roles</h4>\r\n                                        <Button onClick={() => setIsCreatingRole(!isCreatingRole)} size=\"sm\" variant=\"ghost\" className=\"h-6 w-6 p-0 rounded-full bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20\"><UserPlus className=\"w-3 h-3 text-white\" /></Button>\r\n                                    </div>\r\n                                    \r\n                                    {isCreatingRole && (\r\n                                        <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, height: 0 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, height: 'auto' }} className=\"space-y-3 bg-white/5 p-4 rounded-xl border border-white/10\">\r\n                                            <Input placeholder=\"Role Name\" value={newRoleName} onChange={(e) => setNewRoleName(e.target.value)} className=\"h-8 text-xs bg-black/50 border-white/10\" />\r\n                                            <div className=\"space-y-2\">\r\n                                                <div className=\"flex justify-between text-[10px] text-white/40 uppercase\"><span>Priority</span><span>{newRolePriority}</span></div>\r\n                                                <Slider value={newRolePriority} onValueChange={setNewRolePriority} min={10} max={90} step={5} className=\"py-1\" />\r\n                                            </div>\r\n                                            <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\r\n                                                <Button size=\"sm\" onClick={handleCreateRole} disabled={isLoading} className=\"flex-1 h-7 text-[10px] bg-indigo-500 hover:bg-indigo-600\">Create</Button>\r\n                                                <Button size=\"sm\" variant=\"ghost\" onClick={() => setIsCreatingRole(false)} className=\"h-7 w-7 p-0\"><XCircle className=\"w-4 h-4\" /></Button>\r\n                                            </div>\r\n                                        </motion.div>\r\n                                    )}\r\n\r\n                                    <div className=\"space-y-1\">\r\n                                        {roles.map(role => (\r\n                                            <div \r\n                                                key={role.id} \r\n                                                onClick={() => setSelectedRoleForEdit(role)}\r\n                                                className={`group flex items-center justify-between p-3 rounded-xl cursor-pointer border transition-all ${\r\n                                                    selectedRoleForEdit?.id === role.id \r\n                                                    ? 'bg-indigo-500/20 border-indigo-500/50' \r\n                                                    : 'bg-transparent border-transparent hover:bg-white/5'\r\n                                                }`}\r\n                                            >\r\n                                                <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3\">\r\n                                                    {role.is_system_role ? <Lock className=\"w-3 h-3 text-white/30\" /> : <Settings className=\"w-3 h-3 text-white/30\" />}\r\n                                                    <div>\r\n                                                        <p className={`text-sm font-bold ${selectedRoleForEdit?.id === role.id ? 'text-indigo-300' : 'text-white'}`}>{role.name}</p>\r\n                                                        <p className=\"text-[9px] text-white/30 font-mono\">P-{role.priority}</p>\r\n                                                    </div>\r\n                                                </div>\r\n                                                {!role.is_system_role && (\r\n                                                    <Button \r\n                                                        variant=\"ghost\" size=\"icon\" \r\n                                                        className=\"h-6 w-6 text-white/10 hover:text-red-400 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100\"\r\n                                                        onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); handleDeleteRole(role.id); }}\r\n                                                    >\r\n                                                        <Trash2 className=\"w-3 h-3\" />\r\n                                                    </Button>\r\n                                                )}\r\n                                            </div>\r\n                                        ))}\r\n                                    </div>\r\n                                </div>\r\n\r\n                                {/* Right: Permission Matrix */}\r\n                                <div className=\"flex-1 p-6 bg-[#080a0e] overflow-y-auto\">\r\n                                    {selectedRoleForEdit ? (\r\n                                        <div className=\"space-y-6\">\r\n                                            <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between\">\r\n                                                <div>\r\n                                                    <h3 className=\"text-lg font-bold text-white flex items-center gap-2\">\r\n                                                        {selectedRoleForEdit.name}\r\n                                                        <span className=\"text-[10px] bg-white/10 text-white/50 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded font-mono\">\r\n                                                            {selectedRoleForEdit.is_system_role ? 'System' : 'Custom'}\r\n                                                        </span>\r\n                                                    </h3>\r\n                                                    <p className=\"text-xs text-white/30\">\r\n                                                        {selectedRoleForEdit.is_system_role ? 'Core permissions logic is protected.' : 'Configure granular access logic.'}\r\n                                                    </p>\r\n                                                </div>\r\n                                            </div>\r\n\r\n                                            <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 gap-1\">\r\n                                                {permissions.map(perm => {\r\n                                                    const isAssigned = (rolePermissionsMap[selectedRoleForEdit.id] || []).includes(perm.id);\r\n                                                    const isLocked = selectedRoleForEdit.is_editable === false; \r\n                                                    \r\n                                                    return (\r\n                                                        <div key={perm.id} className=\"flex items-center justify-between p-3 rounded-lg border border-white/5 bg-white/[0.01] hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors\">\r\n                                                            <div>\r\n                                                                <p className=\"text-xs font-bold text-white/80\">{perm.key}</p>\r\n                                                                <p className=\"text-[10px] text-white/30\">{perm.description}</p>\r\n                                                            </div>\r\n                                                            <Checkbox \r\n                                                                checked={isAssigned} \r\n                                                                disabled={isLocked || isLoading}\r\n                                                                onCheckedChange={(checked) => handlePermissionToggle(selectedRoleForEdit.id, perm.id, checked as boolean)}\r\n                                                                className=\"border-white/20 data-[state=checked]:bg-indigo-500 data-[state=checked]:border-indigo-500\"\r\n                                                            />\r\n                                                        </div>\r\n                                                    )\r\n                                                })}\r\n                                            </div>\r\n                                        </div>\r\n                                    ) : (\r\n                                        <div className=\"h-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-white/20 text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-center\">\r\n                                            <Settings className=\"w-8 h-8 mb-4 opacity-50\" />\r\n                                            Select a role to configure permissions\r\n                                        </div>\r\n                                    )}\r\n                                </div>\r\n                            </div>\r\n                        </TabsContent>\r\n\r\n                        {/* TEAMS TAB (Enterprise Resource) */}\r\n                        <TabsContent value=\"teams\" className=\"flex-1 overflow-hidden p-0 m-0 data-[state=active]:flex\">\r\n                             <div className=\"flex w-full h-full\">\r\n                                {/* Left: Teams List */}\r\n                                <div className=\"w-1/3 border-r border-white/5 p-6 flex flex-col gap-4 overflow-y-auto\">\r\n                                    <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between\">\r\n                                        <h4 className=\"text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-white/40\">Teams</h4>\r\n                                        <Button onClick={() => setIsCreatingTeam(!isCreatingTeam)} size=\"sm\" variant=\"ghost\" className=\"h-6 w-6 p-0 rounded-full bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20\"><UserPlus className=\"w-3 h-3 text-white\" /></Button>\r\n                                    </div>\r\n\r\n                                    {isCreatingTeam && (\r\n                                        <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0, height: 0 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, height: 'auto' }} className=\"space-y-3 bg-white/5 p-4 rounded-xl border border-white/10\">\r\n                                            <Input placeholder=\"Team Name\" value={newTeamName} onChange={(e) => setNewTeamName(e.target.value)} className=\"h-8 text-xs bg-black/50 border-white/10\" autoFocus />\r\n                                            <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\r\n                                                <Button size=\"sm\" onClick={handleCreateTeam} disabled={isLoading || !newTeamName} className=\"flex-1 h-7 text-[10px] bg-indigo-500 hover:bg-indigo-600\">Create</Button>\r\n                                                <Button size=\"sm\" variant=\"ghost\" onClick={() => setIsCreatingTeam(false)} className=\"h-7 w-7 p-0\"><XCircle className=\"w-4 h-4\" /></Button>\r\n                                            </div>\r\n                                        </motion.div>\r\n                                    )}\r\n\r\n                                    <div className=\"space-y-1\">\r\n                                        {teams.map(team => (\r\n                                            <div \r\n                                                key={team.id} \r\n                                                onClick={() => setSelectedTeam(team)}\r\n                                                className={`group flex items-center justify-between p-3 rounded-xl cursor-pointer border transition-all ${\r\n                                                    selectedTeam?.id === team.id \r\n                                                    ? 'bg-indigo-500/20 border-indigo-500/50' \r\n                                                    : 'bg-transparent border-transparent hover:bg-white/5'\r\n                                                }`}\r\n                                            >\r\n                                                <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3\">\r\n                                                    <div className={`w-8 h-8 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-bold ${selectedTeam?.id === team.id ? 'bg-indigo-500/50 text-white' : 'bg-white/5 text-white/50'}`}>\r\n                                                        {team.name.slice(0,1).toUpperCase()}\r\n                                                    </div>\r\n                                                    <div>\r\n                                                        <p className={`text-sm font-bold ${selectedTeam?.id === team.id ? 'text-indigo-300' : 'text-white'}`}>{team.name}</p>\r\n                                                        <p className=\"text-[9px] text-white/30 font-mono\">{team.members_count} Members</p>\r\n                                                    </div>\r\n                                                </div>\r\n                                            </div>\r\n                                        ))}\r\n                                        {teams.length === 0 && !isCreatingTeam && (\r\n                                            <div className=\"text-center p-4 text-[10px] text-white/30 italic\">No teams yet.</div>\r\n                                        )}\r\n                                    </div>\r\n                                </div>\r\n\r\n                                {/* Right: Team Details */}\r\n                                <div className=\"flex-1 p-6 bg-[#080a0e] overflow-y-auto\">\r\n                                    {selectedTeam ? (\r\n                                        <div className=\"space-y-8\">\r\n                                            <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between\">\r\n                                                <div>\r\n                                                    <h3 className=\"text-xl font-bold text-white mb-1\">{selectedTeam.name}</h3>\r\n                                                    <p className=\"text-xs text-white/40\">Manage members and scope access.</p>\r\n                                                </div>\r\n                                            </div>\r\n\r\n                                            <div className=\"bg-white/[0.02] border border-white/5 rounded-2xl p-6\">\r\n                                                <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 mb-4\">\r\n                                                    <Label className=\"text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-indigo-400\">Add Member</Label>\r\n                                                </div>\r\n                                                <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\r\n                                                    <Select value={addMemberToTeamId} onValueChange={setAddMemberToTeamId}>\r\n                                                        <SelectTrigger className=\"flex-1 h-10 bg-white/5 border-white/10 rounded-xl text-white text-xs\">\r\n                                                            <SelectValue placeholder=\"Select User to Add\" />\r\n                                                        </SelectTrigger>\r\n                                                        <SelectContent className=\"bg-[#1a1d24] border-white/10 text-white\">\r\n                                                             {members\r\n                                                                .filter(m => !selectedTeamMembers.find(tm => tm.user_id === m.user_id))\r\n                                                                .map(m => (\r\n                                                                    <SelectItem key={m.user_id} value={m.user_id}>\r\n // Optional custom URL if we have it in the future\r\n    gender?: string; // For gender-variant dicebear avatars\r\n    className?: string;\r\n    fallbackClassName?: string;\r\n    showFallbackIcon?: boolean; // Whether to show a User icon instead of initials\r\n    seed?: string; // Explicit seed for deterministic avatars (e.g. userId)\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport const UserAvatar: React.FC<UserAvatarProps> = ({\r\n    name,\r\n    avatarUrl,\r\n    gender,\r\n    className = '',\r\n    fallbackClassName = '',\r\n    showFallbackIcon = false,\r\n    seed,\r\n}) => {\r\n    // Ensure name is safe\r\n    const safeName = name || 'Unknown';\r\n    \r\n    // Generate gender-specific avatar seed\r\n    // Use the explicit seed prop if provided, otherwise derived from name/gender\r\n    let avatarSeed = seed || safeName;\r\n    \r\n    if (!seed) {\r\n        const g = gender?.toLowerCase();\r\n        if (g === 'male') {\r\n            avatarSeed = `male-${safeName}`;\r\n        } else if (g === 'female') {\r\n            avatarSeed = `female-${safeName}`;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // Generate initials\r\n    const getInitials = (n: string) => {\r\n        return n\r\n            .split(' ')\r\n            .map((part) => part[0])\r\n            .join('')\r\n            .substring(0, 2)\r\n            .toUpperCase();\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    return (\r\n        <Avatar className={className}>\r\n            <AvatarImage\r\n                src={avatarUrl || `https://api.dicebear.com/7.x/avataaars/svg?seed=${encodeURIComponent(avatarSeed)}`}\r\n                alt={`${safeName}'s avatar`}\r\n            />\r\n            <AvatarFallback className={fallbackClassName}>\r\n                {showFallbackIcon ? useAuth();\r\n    \r\n    // Steps: 1=Email, 2=OTP, 3=NewPassword, 4=Success\r\n    const [step, setStep] = useState<1 | 2 | 3 | 4>(1);\r\n    const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);\r\n    \r\n    // Data\r\n    const [email, setEmail] = useState(initialEmail);\r\n    const [otp, setOtp] = useState('');\r\n    const [newPassword, setNewPassword] = useState('');\r\n    const [confirmPassword, setConfirmPassword] = useState('');\r\n    const [resetToken, setResetToken] = useState('');\r\n    \r\n    // Errors\r\n    const [error, setError] = useState('');\r\n\r\n = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\r\n        e.preventDefault();\r\n        setError('');\r\n        \r\n        try {\r\n            emailSchema.parse(email);\r\n        } catch {\r\n            setError('Please enter a valid email address');\r\n            return;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        setIsLoading(true);\r\n        const { success, error: apiError } = await requestOTP(email, 'forgot_login');\r\n        setIsLoading(false);\r\n\r\n        if (success) {\r\n            setStep(2);\r\n            toast.success('Code Sent', { description: 'Check your email for the verification code.' });\r\n        } else {\r\n            setError(apiError || 'Failed to send code');\r\n        }\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    // Handle OTP Verify\r\n    const handleVerifyOTP = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\r\n        e.preventDefault();\r\n        setError('');\r\n\r\n        if (otp.length !== 6) {\r\n            setError('Code must be 6 digits');\r\n            return;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        setIsLoading(true);\r\n        const { success, resetToken: token, error: apiError } = await verifyOTP(email, otp, 'forgot_login');\r\n        setIsLoading(false);\r\n\r\n        if (success && token) {\r\n            setResetToken(token);\r\n            setStep(3);\r\n        } else {\r\n            setError(apiError || 'Invalid code');\r\n        }\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    // Handle Reset Password\r\n    const handleResetPassword = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\r\n        e.preventDefault();\r\n        setError('');\r\n\r\n        if (newPassword.length < 6) {\r\n            setError('Password must be at least 6 characters');\r\n            return;\r\n        }\r\n        if (newPassword !== confirmPassword) {\r\n            setError('Passwords do not match');\r\n            return;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        setIsLoading(true);\r\n        const { success, error: apiError } = await resetPassword(resetToken, newPassword);\r\n        setIsLoading(false);\r\n\r\n        if (success) {\r\n            setStep(4);\r\n            toast.success('Success', { description: 'Your password has been updated securely.' });\r\n            setTimeout(() => {\r\n                onClose();\r\n            }, 3000);\r\n        } else {\r\n            setError(apiError || 'Failed to reset password');\r\n        }\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    if (!isOpen) return null;\r\n\r\n    return };\r\n        new Audio(sounds[type]).play().catch(() => {});\r\n    }, []);\r\n\r\n    // Win Effect\r\n    useEffect(() => {\r\n        if (winner) {\r\n            playSound('win');\r\n     setVisualPositions(prev => ({ ...prev, [p.id]: target }));\r\n                        }\r\n                    } else {\r\n                        visualPositionsRef.current[p.id] = target;\r\n socket.off('queue-joined');\r\n      socket.off('match-found');\r\n      socket.off('queue-left');\r\n      socket.off('matchmaking-error');\r\n    };\r\n  }, [socket]);\r\n\r\n  // Timer\r\n }\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    return () => {\r\n        mounted = false;\r\n        subscription.unsubscribe();\r\n    };\r\n  }, []);\r\n\r\n  const signUp = async (email: string, password: string, });\r\n\r\n      if (error) {\r\n        toast({\r\n          title: 'Signup Error',\r\n          description: error.message,\r\n          variant: 'destructive',\r\n        });\r\n        return { redirectTo: redirectUrl,\r\n        },\r\n      });\r\n\r\n      if (error) {\r\n        toast({\r\n          title: 'Google Sign In Error',\r\n          description: error.message,\r\n          variant: 'destructive',\r\n        });\r\n        return { error };\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      return { data, error: null };\r\n    } catch (error: unknown) {\r\n      toast({\r\n        title:         if (stream.getTracks().length === 0) {\r\n                newStreams.delete(String(userId));\r\n                logger.info(`[WebSocketContext] Removed empty stream for user ${userId} (${targetMapKey})`);\r\n              }\r\n            }\r\n            return { ...prev, [targetMapKey]: newStreams };\r\n          });\r\n        };\r\n      });\r\n\r\n    sfuManagerRef.current = running on localhost (e.g. Desktop App) to avoid SSL/CORS issues\r\n    if (window.location.hostname === 'localhost' || window.location.hostname === '127.0.0.1') {\r\n       wsUrl = secure to prevent Mixed Content errors\r\n    if (window.location.protocol === 'https:' && wsUrl.startsWith('http:')) {\r\n        wsUrl = wsUrl.replace('http:', 'https:');\r\n        logger.info('Auto-upgraded WebSocket URL to HTTPS due to secure page context');\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    logger.info('Initializing WebSocket connection to:', wsUrl);\r\n    \r\n    signalingRef.current = new SignalingService(wsUrl);\r\n    roomServiceRef.current = new RoomSocketService(signalingRef.current);\r\n\r\n    setupSfuManager();\r\n\r\n    // Connect signaling with error handling\r\n    try {\r\n      signalingRef.current.connect(session?.access_token);\r\n    } catch (error) {\r\n      logger.error('Failed to initialize signaling connection:', error);\r\n      setState(prev => ({ \r\n        ...prev, \r\n        isConnected: false, \r\n        error: `Failed to connect to server: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)}` \r\n      }));\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    return () => {\r\n      signalingRef.current?.disconnect();\r\n      sfuManagerRef.current?.closeAll();\r\n    };\r\n  }, [setupSfuManager, session?.access_token]); \r\n\r\n  // Persist Room ID on join (moved outside to fix Rules of Hooks)\r\n  useEffect(() => {\r\n      if (state.roomId) {\r\n          localStorage.setItem('cospira_last_room_id', state.roomId);\r\n          localStorage.setItem('cospira_last_room_time', Date.now().toString());\r\n      } else {\r\n          localStorage.removeItem('cospira_last_room_id');\r\n          localStorage.removeItem('cospira_last_room_time');\r\n      }\r\n  }, [state.roomId]);\r\n \r\n\r\n  // Use split hooks\r\n  const {\r\n    enableMedia,\r\n    toggleAudio,\r\n    toggleVideo,\r\n    startScreenShare,\r\n    stopScreenShare,\r\n    toggleNoiseSuppression, // Get the function\r\n    toggleAutoFraming,\r\n  } = useMediaStream({\r\n    sfuManagerRef,\r\n    setLocalStream: (stream) => setState(prev => ({ ...prev, localStream: stream })),\r\n    setLocalScreenStream: (stream) => setState(prev => ({ ...prev, localScreenStream: stream })),\r\n    setIsAudioEnabled: (enabled) => setState(prev => ({ ...prev, isAudioEnabled: enabled })),\r\n    setIsVideoEnabled: (enabled) => setState(prev => ({ ...prev, isVideoEnabled: enabled })),\r\n    setIsScreenSharing: (sharing) => setState(prev => ({ ...prev, isScreenSharing: sharing })),\r\n    setIsMediaLoading: (loading) => setState(prev => ({ ...prev, isMediaLoading: loading })),\r\n    setIsNoiseSuppressionEnabled: (enabled) => setState(prev => ({ ...prev, isNoiseSuppressionEnabled: enabled })),\r\n    setIsAutoFramingEnabled: (enabled) => setState(prev => ({ ...prev, isAutoFramingEnabled: enabled })),\r\n    selectedVideoDeviceId: state.selectedVideoDeviceId,\r\n    selectedAudioDeviceId: state.selectedAudioDeviceId,\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  // --- Presence Effect ---\r\n  useEffect(() => {\r\n    // Determine if status changed compared to previous\r\n    // Actually, we should just emit whenever isAway changes.\r\n    // We also need to update local user object in state if we are in the list.\r\n    \r\n    if (!state.roomId || !state.isConnected) return;\r\n\r\n    const status = isAway ? 'away' : 'online';\r\n    logger.info('[Presence] Status changed:', status);\r\n    \r\n    signalingRef.current?.emit('user:status-change', { roomId: state.roomId, status });\r\n\r\n    // Update local state immediately for responsiveness\r\n    const currentUserId = user?.id || guestIdentity?.id;\r\n    setState(prev => ({\r\n        ...prev,\r\n        isAway,\r\n        users: prev.users.map(u => u.id === currentUserId ? { ...u, status } : u)\r\n    }));\r\n\r\n  }, [isAway, state.roomId, state.isConnected, user?.id, guestIdentity?.id]);\r\n\r\n\r\n  // --- STT Management ---\r\n  useEffect(() => {\r\n      // Logic: If Audio + Connected -> Start STT\r\n      // If Audio Disabled -> Stop STT\r\n      const manageSTT = async () => {\r\n          if (state.isAudioEnabled && state.localStream && state.isConnected && state.roomId) {\r\n              // Only start if not already active (STTService handles idempotency but let's be safe)\r\n              // Fetch token\r\n              // Use env key directly for client-side demo\r\n              try {\r\n                  const key = import.meta.env.VITE_DEEPGRAM_API_KEY;\r\n                  if (key) {\r\n                      await STTService.init(key);\r\n                      logger.info('[WebSocketContext] Starting STT...');\r\n                      \r\n                      await STTService.start(state.localStream, (text, isFinal) => {\r\n                          // Emit transcript event\r\n                          if (isFinal) {\r\n                              signalingRef.current?.emit('transcript', {\r\n                                  roomId: stateRef.current.roomId, \r\n                                  text,\r\n                                  timestamp: new Date().toISOString()\r\n                              });\r\n                              \r\n                              setState(prev => ({ \r\n                                  ...prev, \r\n                                  lastTranscript: { \r\n                                      text, \r\n                                      userId: 'me', \r\n                                      timestamp: Date.now(),\r\n                                      isFinal: true \r\n                                  } \r\n                              }));\r\n                          }\r\n                      });\r\n                  } else {\r\n                     // Fallback to fetch if needed or log error\r\n                     // const res = await fetch(...)\r\n                     logger.warn('[WebSocketContext] No STT Key found');\r\n                  }\r\n              } catch (e) {\r\n                  logger.error('Failed to setup STT', e);\r\n              }\r\n          } else {\r\n              STTService.stop();\r\n          }\r\n      };\r\n      \r\n      manageSTT();\r\n      \r\n      return () => {\r\n          // Cleanup handled by dependency change logic, but explicitly on unmount:\r\n          // STTService.stop(); // Don't stop on every render, only if conditions change\r\n      };\r\n  }, [state.isAudioEnabled, state.localStream, state.isConnected, state.roomId]);\r\n\r\n  useSocketEvents({\r\n    signalingRef,\r\n    sfuManagerRef,\r\n    state,\r\n    setState,\r\n    signOut,\r\n    navigate,\r\n    currentUserId: user?.id || guestIdentity?.id || null,\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  // Methods\r\n  const joinRoom = useCallback(\r\n    (\r\n      roomId: string,\r\n      password?: string,\r\n      inviteToken?: string,\r\n      onSuccess?: () => void,\r\n      onError?: (error: string) => void\r\n    ) => {\r\n      // Guest handling: If no user, use persisted guest identity\r\n      let currentGuest = guestIdentity;\r\n      if (!user && !currentGuest) {\r\n         const newId = crypto.randomUUID();\r\n         currentGuest = {\r\n            id: newId,\r\n            name: `Guest ${newId.substring(0, 4).toUpperCase()}`\r\n         };\r\n         setGuestIdentity(currentGuest);\r\n         localStorage.setItem('cospira_guest_identity', JSON.stringify(currentGuest));\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      const userData = {\r\n        id: user?.id || currentGuest!.id,\r\n        name: user?.user_metadata?.display_name || user?.email?.split('@')[0] || currentGuest!.name,\r\n        photoUrl: user?.user_metadata?.photo_url || null,\r\n        gender: user?.user_metadata?.gender || 'other',\r\n        isGuest: !user\r\n      };\r\n\r\n      logger.info('[WebSocketContext] Joining room with user data:', { \r\n        roomId, \r\n        userData,\r\n        fullUser: user ? { id: user.id, email: user.email, metadata: user.user_metadata } : 'Guest'\r\n      });\r\n\r\n      if (roomServiceRef.current) {\r\n        roomServiceRef.current.joinRoom({ roomId, password, inviteToken, user: userData })\r\n          .then((response) => {\r\n            if (response.error === 'waiting') {\r\n              setState((prev) => ({ ...prev, isWaiting: true, error: null }));\r\n              if (onSuccess) onSuccess();\r\n              return;\r\n            }\r\n\r\n            if (!response.success) {\r\n              if (onError) {\r\n                onError(response.error || 'Unknown error');\r\n              } else {\r\n                setState((prev) => ({ ...prev, error: response.error || 'Unknown error' }));\r\n                toast({ title: 'Join Failed', description: response.error, variant: 'destructive' });\r\n              }\r\n            } else if (response.room) {\r\n              logger.info('[WebSocketContext] Join room callback received, waiting for room-joined event');\r\n              if (onSuccess) onSuccess();\r\n            }\r\n          })\r\n          .catch((error) => {\r\n             logger.error('Error joining room:', error);\r\n             if (onError) onError('Failed to join room');\r\n             else setState((prev) => ({ ...prev, error: 'Failed to join room' }));\r\n          });\r\n      }\r\n    },\r\n    [user, guestIdentity]\r\n  );\r\n\r\n  // Store joinRoom in a ref to avoid dependency issues\r\n  const joinRoomRef = useRef(joinRoom);\r\n  useEffect(() => {\r\n    joinRoomRef.current = joinRoom;\r\n  }, [joinRoom]);\r\n\r\n\r\n  const rejoinRoom = useCallback(() => {\r\n    if (state.roomId) {\r\n      logger.info('Reconnecting to room after WebSocket reconnection');\r\n      joinRoomRef.current(state.roomId);\r\n    }\r\n  }, [state.roomId]);\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n  // Track previous connection state to handle reconnections only\r\n  const prevIsConnected = useRef(state.isConnected);\r\n\r\n  // Phase 5: Global Chat\r\n  useEffect(() => {\r\n      if (!signalingRef.current) return;\r\n      \r\n      const onChatMessage = (data: { sender: string, content: string, timestamp: string }) => {\r\n          setState(prev => ({\r\n              ...prev,\r\n              chatMessages: [...(prev.chatMessages || []), {\r\n                  id: crypto.randomUUID(),\r\n                  userId: 'unknown', // Server should send this\r\n                  userName: data.sender,\r\n                  content: data.content,\r\n                  timestamp: new Date(data.timestamp),\r\n                  type: 'global'\r\n              }]\r\n          }));\r\n      };\r\n\r\n      signalingRef.current.on('global-chat-message', onChatMessage);\r\n      \r\n      return () => {\r\n          signalingRef.current?.off('global-chat-message', onChatMessage);\r\n      };\r\n  }, [signalingRef.current]);\r\n\r\n\r\n  useEffect(() => {\r\n    // Only rejoin if we just reconnected (false -> true) and have a room ID\r\n    if (!prevIsConnected.current && state.isConnected) {\r\n        if (state.roomId) {\r\n             rejoinRoom();\r\n        } else {\r\n             // Check local storage for session recovery\r\n             const persistedRoomId = localStorage.getItem('cospira_last_room_id');\r\n             const persistedRoomTime = localStorage.getItem('cospira_last_room_time');\r\n             if (persistedRoomId && persistedRoomTime) {\r\n                 const ONE_HOUR = 60 * 60 * 1000;\r\n                 if (Date.now() - parseInt(persistedRoomTime) < ONE_HOUR) {\r\n                     logger.info('[WebSocketContext] Recovering session:', persistedRoomId);\r\n                     joinRoomRef.current(persistedRoomId, undefined, undefined, () => {\r\n                         toast({ title: 'Session Restored', description: 'Welcome back!' });\r\n                     });\r\n                 }\r\n             }\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    prevIsConnected.current = state.isConnected;\r\n  }, [state.isConnected, state.roomId, rejoinRoom]);\r\n\r\n  const createRoom = useCallback(\r\n    (\r\n      roomId: string,\r\n      roomName: string,\r\n      password?: string,\r\n      accessType: 'public' | 'password' | 'invite' | 'organization' = 'public',\r\n      onSuccess?: () => void,\r\n      orgId?: string,\r\n      settings?: Record<string, unknown>\r\n    ) => {\r\n      if (!state.isConnected) {\r\n          toast({ title: 'Connection Error', description: 'Cannot create room: Disconnected from server', variant: 'destructive' });\r\n          return;\r\n      }\r\n      \r\n      let currentGuest = guestIdentity;\r\n      if (!user && !currentGuest) {\r\n          const newId = crypto.randomUUID();\r\n          currentGuest = {\r\n              id: newId,\r\n              name: `Guest ${newId.substring(0, 4).toUpperCase()}`\r\n          };\r\n          setGuestIdentity(currentGuest);\r\n          localStorage.setItem('cospira_guest_identity', JSON.stringify(currentGuest));\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      const userData = {\r\n        id: user?.id || currentGuest!.id,\r\n        name: user?.user_metadata?.display_name || user?.email?.split('@')[0] || currentGuest!.name,\r\n        isGuest: !user\r\n      };\r\n\r\n      if (roomServiceRef.current) {\r\n        roomServiceRef.current.createRoom({\r\n            roomId,\r\n            roomName,\r\n            password,\r\n            accessType,\r\n            user: userData,\r\n            orgId,\r\n            settings // Pass settings\r\n        }).then(() => {\r\n            joinRoom(roomId, password, undefined, onSuccess);\r\n        });\r\n      }\r\n    },\r\n    [user, joinRoom, guestIdentity, state.isConnected]\r\n  );\r\n\r\n  const sendMessage = useCallback((content: string) => {\r\n    if (!state.roomId) return;\r\n    \r\n    // Check for commands\r\n    if (content.startsWith('/')) {\r\n        signalingRef.current?.emit('assistant:command', { \r\n            roomId: state.roomId, \r\n            text: content \r\n        }, (res: { success: boolean; error?: string }) => {\r\n            if (!res.success) {\r\n                toast({ title: 'AI Error', description: res.error || 'Failed to process command', variant: 'destructive' });\r\n            }\r\n        });\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    if (user || guestIdentity) {\r\n      // Security Check: Rate Limit\r\n      if (!SecurityService.canPerformAction('chat')) {\r\n          toast({ title: 'Slow Down', description: 'You are sending messages too fast.', variant: 'destructive' });\r\n          return;\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      // Security Check: Sanitize\r\n      const sanitizedContent = SecurityService.sanitizeInput(content);\r\n      if (!sanitizedContent) return;\r\n\r\n      const messageData = {\r\n        roomId: state.roomId,\r\n        message: {\r\n          content: sanitizedContent,\r\n        },\r\n      };\r\n      \r\n      signalingRef.current?.emit('send-message', messageData, (response?: { success: boolean }) => {\r\n        if (!response?.success) {\r\n          toast({ title: 'Error', description: 'Failed to send message', variant: 'destructive' });\r\n        }\r\n      });\r\n    }\r\n  }, [state.roomId, user, guestIdentity]);\r\n\r\n  const uploadFile = useCallback(async (file: File): Promise<boolean> => {\r\n    if (!state.roomId || !user) return false;\r\n\r\n    return new Promise((resolve) => {\r\n      const reader = new FileReader();\r\n      reader.onload = (e) => {\r\n        if (e.target?.result) {\r\n          const fileData = {\r\n            id: crypto.randomUUID(),\r\n            userId: user.id,\r\n            userName: user.user_metadata?.display_name || user.email?.split('@')[0] || 'Guest',\r\n            name: file.name,\r\n            size: file.size,\r\n            type: file.type,\r\n            content: e.target.result, // Base64 content\r\n            timestamp: new Date(),\r\n          };\r\n\r\n          signalingRef.current?.emit('upload-file', { roomId: state.roomId!, file: fileData }, (response?: { success: boolean; error?: string }) => {\r\n            if (response?.success) {\r\n              resolve(true);\r\n            } else {\r\n              toast({ title: 'Upload Failed', description: response?.error || 'Unknown error', variant: 'destructive' });\r\n              resolve(false);\r\n            }\r\n          });\r\n        }\r\n      };\r\n      reader.readAsDataURL(file);\r\n    });\r\n  }, [state.roomId, user]);\r\n\r\n  const sendFile = uploadFile;\r\n\r\n  const leaveRoom = useCallback(() => {\r\n    if (state.roomId) {\r\n      roomServiceRef.current?.leaveRoom(state.roomId);\r\n      sfuManagerRef.current?.closeAll();\r\n      setState((prev) => ({\r\n        ...prev,\r\n        roomId: null,\r\n        roomName: null,\r\n        users: [],\r\n        messages: [],\r\n        files: [],\r\n        isHost: false,\r\n        localStream: null,\r\n && state.isHost) {\r\n      roomServiceRef.current?.kickUser(state.roomId, userId);\r\n    }\r\n  }, [state.roomId, state.isHost]);\r\n\r\n  const updateRoomSettings = useCallback((roomName?: string, const denyUser = useCallback((userId: string) => {\r\n    if (state.roomId && state.isHost) {\r\n      roomServiceRef.current?.denyUser(state.roomId, userId);\r\n    }\r\n  }, [state.roomId, roomServiceRef.current?.admitUser(state.roomId!, user.id);\r\n      });\r\n    }\r\n  }, [state.roomId, state.isHost, state.waitingUsers]);\r\n\r\n  const toggleRoomLock = useCallback(() => {\r\n string) => {\r\n    if (state.roomId && user) {\r\n      const presenterName = user.user_metadata?.display_name || user.email?.split('@')[0] || 'Guest';\r\n      logger.debug('[DEBUG] Emitting presenterName \r\n      });\r\n      \r\n      // State will be updated via 'youtube-started' event which is now broadcast to all (including sender)\r\n    }\r\n  }, [state.roomId, user]);\r\n\r\n  const stopYoutubeVideo = useCallback(() => {\r\n    if (state.roomId) {\r\n      signalingRef.current?.emit('close-youtube', { roomId: state.roomId });\r\n      \r\n      // State will be updated via 'youtube-closed' event which is now broadcast to all (including sender)\r\n    }\r\n  }, [state.roomId]);\r\n\r\n  const playYoutubeVideo = useCallback((time: number) => {\r\n    if (state.roomId) signalingRef.current?.emit('start-game', { roomId: state.roomId, type, players, config });\r\n    }\r\n  }, [state.roomId]);\r\n\r\n  const makeGameMove = useCallback((move: unknown) => {\r\n    if string): Promise<{ success: boolean; error?: string; [key: string]: unknown }> => {\r\n    return new Promise((resolve) => {\r\n        // Fallback to fetch if socket not connected (though socket is preferred)\r\n        if (!signalingRef.current?.connected) {\r\n             // Try fetch as last resort\r\n             let baseUrl: string;\r\n             if (window.location.hostname === 'localhost' || window.location.hostname === '127.0.0.1') {\r\n                 baseUrl = 'https://localhost:3001';\r\n             } else {\r\n                 baseUrl = window.location.origin;\r\n             }\r\n             \r\n             if (baseUrl.startsWith('ws:')) baseUrl = baseUrl.replace('ws:', 'http:');\r\n             else if (baseUrl.startsWith('wss:')) baseUrl = baseUrl.replace('wss:', 'https:');\r\n             \r\n             fetch(`${baseUrl}/api/room-info/${roomId}`)\r\n                 .then(res => {\r\n                     if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Not found');\r\n                     return res.json();\r\n                 })\r\n                 .then(data => resolve({ ...data, success: true }))\r\n                 .catch(() => resolve({ success: false, error: 'Connection failed' }));\r\n             return;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // Use Socket\r\n        signalingRef.current.emit('check-room', { roomId }, (response: { success: boolean; error?: string; [key: string]: unknown }) => {\r\n             resolve(response);\r\n        });\r\n    });\r\n  }, []);\r\n\r\n  const getRecentRooms = useCallback(async (callback?: (rooms: unknown[]) => void) => {\r\n     // Priority: Socket > Fetch\r\n    if (signalingRef.current?.connected) {\r\n         signalingRef.current.emit('get-rooms', (rooms: unknown[]) => {\r\n              logger.info('[WebSocketContext] Socket get-rooms response:', rooms?.length || 0);\r\n              if (callback) callback(rooms || []);\r\n         });\r\n         return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    try {\r\n      // Dynamic WebSocket URL determination\r\n      let wsUrl = import.meta.env.VITE_WS_URL;\r\n      \r\n      let baseUrl: string;\r\n      if (window.location.hostname === 'localhost' || window.location.hostname === '127.0.0.1') {\r\n          wsUrl = 'https://localhost:3001';\r\n          baseUrl = wsUrl;\r\n      } else {\r\n          // Use proxy via current origin\r\n          baseUrl = window.location.origin;\r\n      }\r\n      \r\n      // Cleanup if wsUrl was used to derive baseUrl\r\n      if (baseUrl.startsWith('ws:')) baseUrl = baseUrl.replace('ws:', 'http:');\r\n const rooms = await response.json();\r\n        logger.info('[WebSocketContext] Fetched recent rooms:', rooms.length);\r\n        if (callback) callback(rooms);\r\n      } else {\r\n        logger.warn('[WebSocketContext] Failed to fetch rooms:', response.status);\r\n        if (callback) callback([]);\r\n      }\r\n    } catch (e) {\r\n      logger.error('[WebSocketContext] Error activeGame);\r\n    if (!validation.valid) {\r\n      console.error('Invalid move:', validation.reason);\r\n      return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // Apply move\r\n    const newState = activeGame.createdAt.getTime()) / 1000)\r\n    );\r\n\r\n    // Save match history\r\n    await playerService.saveMatchHistory({\r\n      gameType: 'chess',\r\n      mode: 'casual',\r\n      players: activeGame.players,\r\n      winnerId: winner === 'draw' ? undefined : winner || undefined,\r\n      initialState: activeGame,\r\n      finalState: activeGame,\r\n      moveHistory: activeGame.metadata.moveHistory || [],\r\n      duration: Math.floor((Date.now() - activeGame.createdAt.getTime()) / 1000),\r\n    });\r\n  };\r\n\r\n  return (\r\n    <div>\r\n      <h2>Chess Game</h2>\r\n      {stats && (\r\n        <div>\r\n          <p>ELO: {stats.elo}</p>\r\n          <p>Rank: {stats.rank}</p>\r\n          <p>Win Rate: {stats.winRate}%</p>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n      <button onClick={handleStartGame}>Start Game</button>\r\n    </div>\r\n  );\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Example: Using Player Profile Hook\r\n */\r\nexport function PlayerProfileExample() {\r\n  const { profile, loading, updateProfile } = usePlayerProfile();\r\n\r\n  if (loading) return <div>Loading...</div>;\r\n  if (!profile) return <div>No profile found</div>;\r\n\r\n  return (\r\n    <div>\r\n      <h2>{profile.username}</h2>\r\n      <p>Level: {profile.level}</p>\r\n      <p>XP: {profile.xp}</p>\r\n      <p>Title: {profile.title}</p>\r\n      \r\n      <button onClick={() => updateProfile({ bio: 'New bio!' })}>\r\n        Update Bio\r\n      </button>\r\n    </div>\r\n  );\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Example: Displaying Leaderboard\r\n */\r\nexport function LeaderboardExample() {\r\n  const [gameType, setGameType] = useState<GameType>('chess');\r\n  const [leaderboard, setLeaderboard] = useState<any[]>([]);\r\n\r\n  useEffect(() => {\r\n    async function fetchLeaderboard() {\r\n      const data = await playerService.getLeaderboard(gameType, 10);\r\n      setLeaderboard(data);\r\n    }\r\n    fetchLeaderboard();\r\n  }, [gameType]);\r\n\r\n  return (\r\n    <div>\r\n      <h2>Leaderboard - {gameType}</h2>\r\n      <select value={gameType} onChange={(e) => setGameType(e.target.value as GameType)}>\r\n        <option value=\"chess\">Chess</option>\r\n        <option value=\"xoxo\">Tic-Tac-Toe</option>\r\n      </select>\r\n      \r\n      <ol>\r\n        {leaderboard.map((entry, index) => (\r\n          <li key={entry.id}>\r\n            #{index + 1} - 'O' : 'X';\r\n\r\n    if (this.checkWin(newBoard, opponent, 3, winCondition)) {\r\n      return { index: -1, score: -10 };\r\n    } else if (this.checkWin(newBoard, player, 3, winCondition)) {\r\n      return { index: -1, score: 10 };\r\n    } else if (availSpots.length === 0) {\r\n      return { index: -1, score: 0 };\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    const moves: { index: number, score: number }[] = [];\r\n\r\n    for (let i = 0; i < availSpots.length; i++) {\r\n      const move: any = {};\r\n      move.index = availSpots[i];\r\n      newBoard[availSpots[i]] = player;\r\n\r\n      const result = this.minimax(newBoard, opponent, winCondition);\r\n      move.score = result.score;\r\n\r\n      newBoard[availSpots[i]] = null;\r\n      moves.push(move);\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    let bestMove = 0;\r\n    if (player === player) { // Maximizing logic is slightly different in recursive calls usually, but simplified here\r\n        // Actually standard minimax:\r\n        // If it's the AI's turn (Maximizing), pick highest score.\r\n        // Wait, the recursive call above passes 'opponent'. \r\n        // So if I am 'X', I call minimax for 'O'. 'O' will try to minimize 'X' score?\r\n        // Let's stick to a cleaner implementation.\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // Re-implementing standard minimax carefully\r\n    return this.minimaxScore(newBoard, player, player, opponent, 3, winCondition);\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  private static minimaxScore(\r\n    board: Board, \r\n    currentPlayer: string, \r\n    aiPlayer: string, \r\n    humanPlayer: string,\r\n    size: number,\r\n    winCondition: number\r\n  ): { index: number, score: number } {\r\n    const availSpots = board.map((c, i) => c === null ? i : null).filter(v => v !== null) as number[];\r\n\r\n    if (this.checkWin(board, humanPlayer, size, winCondition)) return { index: -1, score: -10 };\r\n    if (this.checkWin(board, aiPlayer, size, winCondition)) return { index: -1, score: 10 };\r\n    if (availSpots.length === 0) return { index: -1, score: 0 };\r\n\r\n    const moves = [];\r\n\r\n    for (let i = 0; i < availSpots.length; i++) {\r\n      const idx = availSpots[i];\r\n      board[idx] = currentPlayer;\r\n\r\n      const result = this.minimaxScore(\r\n        board, \r\n        currentPlayer === aiPlayer ? humanPlayer : aiPlayer, \r\n        aiPlayer, \r\n        humanPlayer,\r\n        size,\r\n        winCondition\r\n      );\r\n\r\n      moves.push({ index: idx, score: result.score });\r\n      board[idx] = null;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    let bestMove = 0;\r\n    if (currentPlayer === aiPlayer) {\r\n      let bestScore = -10000;\r\n      for (let i = 0; i < moves.length; i++) {\r\n        if (moves[i].score > bestScore) {\r\n          bestScore = moves[i].score;\r\n          bestMove = i;\r\n        }\r\n      }\r\n    } else {\r\n      let bestScore = 10000;\r\n      for (let i = 0; i < moves.length; i++) {\r\n        if (moves[i].score < bestScore) {\r\n          bestScore = moves[i].score;\r\n          bestMove = i;\r\n        }\r\n      }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    return moves[bestMove];\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  // --- Alpha-Beta Pruning for Larger Boards ---\r\n\r\n  private static alphaBetaSearch(\r\n    board: Board, \r\n    player: string, \r\n    size: number, \r\n    winCondition: number, \r\n    depth: number\r\n  ): number {\r\n    const aiPlayer = player;\r\n    const humanPlayer = player === 'X' ? 'O' : 'X';\r\n    \r\n    // Get all empty spots\r\n    const availSpots = board.map((c, i) => c === null ? i : null).filter(v => v !== null) as number[];\r\n    \r\n    let bestScore = -Infinity;\r\n    let bestMove = availSpots[0];\r\n    let alpha = -Infinity;\r\n    let beta = Infinity;\r\n\r\n    for (const move of availSpots) {\r\n      board[move] = aiPlayer;\r\n      const score = this.minimaxAlphaBeta(board, depth - 1, false, alpha, beta, aiPlayer, humanPlayer, size, winCondition);\r\n      board[move] = null;\r\n\r\n      if (score > bestScore) {\r\n        bestScore = score;\r\n        bestMove = move;\r\n      }\r\n      alpha = Math.max(alpha, bestScore);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    return bestMove;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  private static minimaxAlphaBeta(\r\n    board: Board, \r\n    depth: number, \r\n    isMaximizing: boolean, \r\n    alpha: number, \r\n    beta: number,\r\n    aiPlayer: string,\r\n    humanPlayer: string,\r\n    size: number,\r\n    winCondition: number\r\n  ): number {\r\n    if (this.checkWin(board, aiPlayer, size, winCondition)) return 10 + depth;\r\n    if (this.checkWin(board, humanPlayer, size, winCondition)) return -10 - depth;\r\n    \r\n    const availSpots = board.map((c, i) => c === null ? i : null).filter(v => v !== null) as number[];\r\n    if (availSpots.length === 0 || depth === 0) return this.evaluateBoard(board, aiPlayer, humanPlayer, size, winCondition);\r\n\r\n    if (isMaximizing) {\r\n      let maxEval = -Infinity;\r\n      for (const move of availSpots) {\r\n        board[move] = aiPlayer;\r\n        const evalScore = this.minimaxAlphaBeta(board, depth - 1, false, alpha, beta, aiPlayer, humanPlayer, size, winCondition);\r\n        board[move] = null;\r\n        maxEval = Math.max(maxEval, evalScore);\r\n        alpha = Math.max(alpha, evalScore);\r\n        if (beta <= alpha) break;\r\n      }\r\n      return maxEval;\r\n    } else {\r\n      let minEval = Infinity;\r\n      for (const move of availSpots) {\r\n        board[move] = humanPlayer;\r\n        const evalScore = this.minimaxAlphaBeta(board, depth - 1, true, alpha, beta, aiPlayer, humanPlayer, size, winCondition);\r\n        board[move] = null;\r\n        minEval = Math.min(minEval, evalScore);\r\n        beta = Math.min(beta, evalScore);\r\n        if (beta <= alpha) break;\r\n      }\r\n      return minEval;\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  // --- Utilities ---\r\n\r\n  private static checkWin(board: Board, player: string, size: number, winCondition: number): boolean {\r\n    // Check rows\r\n    for (let r = 0; r < size; r++) {\r\n      for (let c = 0; c <= size - winCondition; c++) {\r\n        let match = true;\r\n        for (let k = 0; k < winCondition; k++) {\r\n          if (board[r * size + c + k] !== player) {\r\n            match = false;\r\n            break;\r\n          }\r\n        }\r\n        if (match) return true;\r\n      }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // Check columns\r\n    for (let c = 0; c < size; c++) {\r\n      for (let r = 0; r <= size - winCondition; r++) {\r\n        let match = true;\r\n        for (let k = 0; k < winCondition; k++) {\r\n          if (board[(r + k) * size + c] !== player) {\r\n            match = false;\r\n            break;\r\n          }\r\n        }\r\n        if (match) return true;\r\n      }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // Check main diagonal\r\n    for (let r = 0; r <= size - winCondition; r++) {\r\n      for (let c = 0; c <= size - winCondition; c++) {\r\n        let match = true;\r\n        for (let k = 0; k < winCondition; k++) {\r\n          if (board[(r + k) * size + c + k] !== player) {\r\n            match = false;\r\n            break;\r\n          }\r\n        }\r\n        if (match) return true;\r\n      }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // Check anti-diagonal\r\n    for (let r = 0; r <= size - winCondition; r++) {\r\n      for (let c = winCondition - 1; c < size; c++) {\r\n        let match = true;\r\n        for (let k = 0; k < winCondition; k++) {\r\n          if (board[(r + k) * size + c - k] !== player) {\r\n            match = false;\r\n            break;\r\n          }\r\n        }\r\n        if (match) return true;\r\n      }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    return false;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  private static evaluateBoard(board: Board, aiPlayer: string, humanPlayer: string, size: number, winCondition: number): number {\r\n    // Basic heuristic: check for near wins\r\n    let score = 0;\r\n    \r\n    // Count potential winning lines for AI\r\n    // (Simplified random fallback for now if no immediate threats)\r\n    if (this.checkWin(board, aiPlayer, size, winCondition)) return 100;\r\n    if (this.checkWin(board, humanPlayer, size, winCondition)) return -100;\r\n\r\n    score += Math.random() * 0.5; // Slight randomness to avoid deterministic loops\r\n    return score;\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n","usedDeprecatedRules":[]},{"filePath":"C:\\Users\\mahes\\Downloads\\PROJECTS\\COSPIRA_PROJECT\\COSPIRA_MAIN\\src\\game-engine\\core\\BaseGameEngine.ts","messages":[{"ruleId":"@typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any","severity":2,"message":"Unexpected any.
