Usually easier to send full configuration when \"Ready\" is clicked.\r\n            return { valid: true };\r\n        }\r\n        return { valid: false, reason: 'Invalid move for SETUP phase' };\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    if (phase === 'BATTLE') {\r\n        if (move.playerId !== state.currentTurn) return { valid: false, reason: 'Not your turn' };\r\n        if (move.type !== 'shoot') return { valid: false, reason: 'Invalid move type' };\r\n        \r\n        const { r, c } = move.data;\r\n        if (r < 0 || r >= this.BOARD_SIZE || c < 0 || c >= this.BOARD_SIZE) return { valid: false, reason: 'Out of bounds' };\r\n        \r\n        // Check if already shot at this location\r\n        // Target is opponent\r\n        const opponent = state.players.find(p => p.id !== move.playerId);\r\n        if (!opponent) return { valid: false };\r\n        \r\n        const targetBoard = state.board[opponent.id] as PlayerBoard;\r\n        const cell = targetBoard.grid[r][c];\r\n        if (cell === 'hit' || cell === 'miss') return { valid: false, reason: 'Already shot here' };\r\n\r\n        return { valid: true };\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    return { valid: false };\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  applyMove(move: Move, state: GameState): GameState {\r\n    const newState = { ...state, board: JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(state.board)) }; // Deep copy\r\n    const { phase } = state.metadata;\r\n\r\n    if (phase === 'SETUP') {\r\n        if (move.type === 'place_ships') {\r\n            const board = newState.board[move.playerId];\r\n            board.ships = move.data.ships; // Assume valid for now or validation was heavy\r\n            \r\n            // Reconstruct grid based on ships\r\n            board.grid = Array(this.BOARD_SIZE).fill(null).map(() => Array(this.BOARD_SIZE).fill('empty'));\r\n            board.ships.forEach((ship: Ship) => {\r\n                ship.coords.forEach(({r, c}) => {\r\n                    board.grid[r][c] = 'ship';\r\n                });\r\n            });\r\n\r\n            board.isReady = true;\r\n\r\n            // Check if both ready\r\n            const allReady = newState.players.every((p: Player) => newState.board[p.id].isReady);\r\n            if (allReady) {\r\n                newState.metadata.phase = 'BATTLE';\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n    } else if (phase === 'BATTLE') {\r\n        const opponent = state.players.find(p => p.id !== move.playerId);\r\n        if (!opponent) throw new Error('No opponent found');\r\n\r\n        const targetBoard = newState.board[opponent.id] as PlayerBoard;\r\n        const { r, c } = move.data;\r\n\r\n        // Process Shot\r\n        if (targetBoard.grid[r][c] === 'ship') {\r\n            targetBoard.grid[r][c] = 'hit';\r\n            // Update ship hits\r\n            const ship = targetBoard.ships.find((s: Ship) => s.coords.some(coord => coord.r === r && coord.c === c));\r\n            if (ship) ship.hits++;\r\n            \r\n            newState.metadata.lastResult = 'HIT';\r\n        } else {\r\n            targetBoard.grid[r][c] = 'miss';\r\n            newState.metadata.lastResult = 'MISS';\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // Switch turn\r\n        newState.currentTurn = this.getNextPlayer(state);\r\n        newState.metadata.moveHistory.push(move);\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    const winnerCheck = this.checkWinner(newState);\r\n    if (winnerCheck.finished) {\r\n        newState.status = 'finished';\r\n        newState.winner = winnerCheck.winner;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    this.state = newState;\r\n    return newState;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  checkWinner(state: GameState): WinnerResult {\r\n      if (state.metadata.phase === 'SETUP') return { finished: false, winner: null };\r\n\r\n      for (const player of state.players) {\r\n          const opponent = state.players.find(p => p.id !== player.id);\r\n          if (!opponent) continue; // Should not happen\r\n\r\n          // Check if Opponent has lost (all ships sunk)\r\n          const opBoard = state.board[opponent.id] as PlayerBoard;\r\n          const allSunk = opBoard.ships.every((s: Ship) => s.hits >= s.size);\r\n          \r\n          if (allSunk) {\r\n              return { finished: true, winner: player.id };\r\n          }\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      return { finished: false, winner: null };\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  getValidMoves(state: GameState): Move[] {\r\n      return []; // Not implemented for simple AI yet\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n","usedDeprecatedRules":[]},{"filePath":"C:\\Users\\mahes\\Downloads\\PROJECTS\\COSPIRA_PROJECT\\COSPIRA_MAIN\\src\\game-engine\\engines\\BilliardsEngine.ts","messages":[{"ruleId":"@typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars","severity":2,"message":"'state' is defined but never used. Allowed unused args must match /^_/u.","line":232,"column":25,"nodeType":"Identifier","messageId":"unusedVar","endLine":232,"endColumn":30}],"suppressedMessages":[],"errorCount":1,"fatalErrorCount":0,"warningCount":0,"fixableErrorCount":0,"fixableWarningCount":0,"source":"import { BaseGameEngine } from '../core/BaseGameEngine';\r\nimport {\r\n  GameState,\r\n  Move,\r\n  Player,\r\n  ValidationResult,\r\n  WinnerResult,\r\n} from '../core/GameEngine.interface';\r\n\r\n// --- Constants ---\r\nconst TABLE_WIDTH = 800;\r\nconst TABLE_HEIGHT = 400;\r\nconst BALL_RADIUS = 10;\r\nconst POCKET_RADIUS = 18;\r\nconst RAIL_FRICTION = 0.985; // Drag factor per frame\r\nconst COLLISION_LOSS = 0.95; // Energy lost on ball-ball collision\r\nconst VELOCITY_THRESHOLD = 0.05; // Stop threshold\r\n\r\n// --- Types ---\r\nexport type BallType = 'solid' | 'stripe' | 'black' | 'white';\r\n\r\nexport interface Ball {\r\n  id: number; // 0 = white, 8 = black, 1-7 solids, 9-15 stripes\r\n  x: number;\r\n  y: number;\r\n  vx: number;\r\n  vy: number;\r\n  type: BallType;\r\n  visible: boolean; // False if pocketed\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport interface BilliardsGameState extends GameState {\r\n  balls: Ball[];\r\n  cueBall: Ball; // Helper ref to ball 0\r\n  activePlayerType: 'solid' | 'stripe' | 'open';\r\n  isBreakShot: boolean;\r\n  shotInProgress: boolean;\r\n  foulReason: string | null;\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport class BilliardsEngine extends BaseGameEngine {\r\n  \r\n  // Game Constants\r\n  readonly POCKETS = [\r\n      { x: 0, y: 0 },\r\n      { x: TABLE_WIDTH / 2, y: 0 },\r\n      { x: TABLE_WIDTH, y: 0 },\r\n      { x: 0, y: TABLE_HEIGHT },\r\n      { x: TABLE_WIDTH / 2, y: TABLE_HEIGHT },\r\n      { x: TABLE_WIDTH, y: TABLE_HEIGHT }\r\n  ];\r\n\r\n  initGame(players: Player[]): BilliardsGameState {\r\n    const balls = this.setupRack();\r\n    \r\n    const gameState: BilliardsGameState = {\r\n      id: this.generateGameId(),\r\n      type: 'billiards',\r\n      players: players,\r\n      currentTurn: players[0].id,\r\n      status: 'active',\r\n      winner: null,\r\n      board: null,\r\n      balls: balls,\r\n      cueBall: balls[0],\r\n      activePlayerType: 'open',\r\n      isBreakShot: true,\r\n      shotInProgress: false,\r\n      foulReason: null,\r\n      metadata: {\r\n        moveHistory: [],\r\n        moveCount: 0,\r\n      },\r\n      createdAt: new Date(),\r\n      updatedAt: new Date(),\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    this.state = gameState;\r\n    return gameState;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  // --- Physics Simulation (Run this ~60 times per shot or deterministically) ---\r\n  // Note: For turn-based, we might just expose a 'simulateShot' method that returns the final state.\r\n  // But for the shared visual, we pass the force params and let clients simulate too.\r\n  // This 'applyMove' calculates the final resting position to serve as authority.\r\n  \r\n  simulateShot(angle: number, power: number): void {\r\n      const state = this.state as BilliardsGameState;\r\n      const cue = state.balls[0];\r\n      \r\n      // Apply impulse\r\n      const forceWrapper = Math.min(power, 30); // Cap power\r\n      cue.vx = Math.cos(angle) * forceWrapper;\r\n      cue.vy = Math.sin(angle) * forceWrapper;\r\n\r\n      state.shotInProgress = true;\r\n      \r\n      // Run Physics Loop until all stopped (with safety limit)\r\n      let steps = 0;\r\n      const MAX_STEPS = 5000; // ~83 seconds at 60fps\r\n      \r\n      while (this.areBallsMoving(state.balls) && steps < MAX_STEPS) {\r\n          this.stepPhysics(state.balls);\r\n          steps++;\r\n      }\r\n      \r\n      state.shotInProgress = false;\r\n      this.handleShotResult(state);\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  private stepPhysics(balls: Ball[]) {\r\n      balls.forEach(ball => {\r\n          if (!ball.visible) return;\r\n\r\n          // Integration\r\n          ball.x += ball.vx;\r\n          ball.y += ball.vy;\r\n\r\n          // Friction\r\n          ball.vx *= RAIL_FRICTION;\r\n          ball.vy *= RAIL_FRICTION;\r\n\r\n          // Stop if slow\r\n          if (Math.abs(ball.vx) < VELOCITY_THRESHOLD) ball.vx = 0;\r\n          if (Math.abs(ball.vy) < VELOCITY_THRESHOLD) ball.vy = 0;\r\n\r\n          // Wall Collisions\r\n          if (ball.x < BALL_RADIUS) { ball.x = BALL_RADIUS; ball.vx *= -1; }\r\n          if (ball.x > TABLE_WIDTH - BALL_RADIUS) { ball.x = TABLE_WIDTH - BALL_RADIUS; ball.vx *= -1; }\r\n          if (ball.y < BALL_RADIUS) { ball.y = BALL_RADIUS; ball.vy *= -1; }\r\n          if (ball.y > TABLE_HEIGHT - BALL_RADIUS) { ball.y = TABLE_HEIGHT - BALL_RADIUS; ball.vy *= -1; }\r\n\r\n          // Pocket Check\r\n          this.POCKETS.forEach(p => {\r\n              const dx = ball.x - p.x;\r\n              const dy = ball.y - p.y;\r\n              if (Math.sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy) < POCKET_RADIUS) {\r\n                  ball.visible = false;\r\n                  ball.vx = 0;\r\n                  ball.vy = 0;\r\n              }\r\n          });\r\n      });\r\n\r\n      // Ball-Ball Collisions\r\n      for (let i = 0; i < balls.length; i++) {\r\n          for (let j = i + 1; j < balls.length; j++) {\r\n              const b1 = balls[i];\r\n              const b2 = balls[j];\r\n              if (!b1.visible || !b2.visible) continue;\r\n\r\n              const dx = b2.x - b1.x;\r\n              const dy = b2.y - b1.y;\r\n              const dist = Math.sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy);\r\n\r\n              if (dist < BALL_RADIUS * 2) {\r\n                  // Resolve Overlap\r\n                  const angle = Math.atan2(dy, dx);\r\n                  const overlap = (BALL_RADIUS * 2 - dist) / 2;\r\n                  b1.x -= Math.cos(angle) * overlap;\r\n                  b1.y -= Math.sin(angle) * overlap;\r\n                  b2.x += Math.cos(angle) * overlap;\r\n                  b2.y += Math.sin(angle) * overlap;\r\n\r\n                  // Resolve Velocity (Elastic 2D)\r\n                  const nx = Math.cos(angle);\r\n                  const ny = Math.sin(angle);\r\n                  // Normal velocity components\r\n                  const v1n = b1.vx * nx + b1.vy * ny;\r\n                  const v2n = b2.vx * nx + b2.vy * ny;\r\n                  \r\n                  // Tangential velocity components (unchanged)\r\n                  const tx = -ny;\r\n                  const ty = nx;\r\n                  const v1t = b1.vx * tx + b1.vy * ty;\r\n                  const v2t = b2.vx * tx + b2.vy * ty;\r\n\r\n                  // Swap normal velocities (elastic) + loss\r\n                  const v1nFinal = v2n * COLLISION_LOSS;\r\n                  const v2nFinal = v1n * COLLISION_LOSS;\r\n\r\n                  // Convert back\r\n                  b1.vx = v1nFinal * nx + v1t * tx;\r\n                  b1.vy = v1nFinal * ny + v1t * ty;\r\n                  b2.vx = v2nFinal * nx + v2t * tx;\r\n                  b2.vy = v2nFinal * ny + v2t * ty;\r\n              }\r\n          }\r\n      }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  private areBallsMoving(balls: Ball[]): boolean {\r\n      return balls.some(b => b.visible && (Math.abs(b.vx) > 0 || Math.abs(b.vy) > 0));\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  // --- Game Rule Logic ---\r\n\r\n  private handleShotResult(state: BilliardsGameState) {\r\n      if (!state.cueBall.visible) {\r\n          state.foulReason = 'Scratch! Cue ball pocketed.';\r\n          // Respawn Cue Logic (Usually ball in hand, here center for simplicity)\r\n          state.cueBall.visible = true;\r\n          state.cueBall.x = TABLE_WIDTH / 4;\r\n          state.cueBall.y = TABLE_HEIGHT / 2;\r\n          this.switchTurn(state);\r\n          return;\r\n      }\r\n      \r\n      // Determine if valid balls pocketed\r\n      // This is simplified. \r\n      // Real pool needs to track \"First Contact\".\r\n      // Implementation omitted for brevity of this pass, focusing on physics.\r\n      \r\n      this.switchTurn(state); // Always switch turn for this simple v1\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  private switchTurn(state: BilliardsGameState) {\r\n      const pIdx = state.players.findIndex(p => p.id === state.currentTurn);\r\n      state.currentTurn = state.players[(pIdx + 1) % state.players.length].id;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  validateMove(move: Move, state: BilliardsGameState): ValidationResult {\r\n      if (move.playerId !== state.currentTurn) return { valid: false, reason: 'Not your turn' };\r\n      if (state.shotInProgress) return { valid: false, reason: 'Balls moving' };\r\n      \r\n      // \"Move\" here is just parameters\r\n      if (!move.data.angle || !move.data.power) return { valid: false };\r\n\r\n      return { valid: true };\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  applyMove(move: Move, state: BilliardsGameState): BilliardsGameState {\r\n      // Simulate here for authority\r\n      // Clients will also simulate for visuals\r\n      this.simulateShot(move.data.angle, move.data.power);\r\n      \r\n      return this.state as BilliardsGameState;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  checkWinner(state: BilliardsGameState): WinnerResult {\r\n     // Check 8-ball status\r\n     const blackBall = state.balls.find(b => b.id === 8);\r\n     if (!blackBall?.visible) {\r\n         // Immediate Win/Loss depending on if other balls cleared\r\n         // Simpler: If 8 ball sinks, current player wins (casual rule)\r\n         return { finished: true, winner: state.currentTurn };\r\n     }\r\n     return { finished: false, winner: null };\r\n  }\r\n  \r\n  // --- Setup Helpers ---\r\n  private setupRack(): Ball[] {\r\n      const balls: Ball[] = [];\r\n      const startX = TABLE_WIDTH * 0.75;\r\n      const startY = TABLE_HEIGHT / 2;\r\n      \r\n      // 1. Cue Ball\r\n      balls.push({ id: 0, x: TABLE_WIDTH * 0.25, y: startY, vx: 0, vy: 0, type: 'white', visible: true });\r\n\r\n      // Rack Layout (Triangle)\r\n      // row 0: 1\r\n      // row 1: 2\r\n      // ...\r\n      let idCounter = 1;\r\n      const rows = 5;\r\n      for (let col = 0; col < rows; col++) {\r\n          for (let row = 0; row <= col; row++) {\r\n              const x = startX + col * (BALL_RADIUS * 1.8); // 1.8 cos 30? 100;\r\n\r\n    // Generate Snakes (Head > Tail)\r\n    let snakesCount = 0;\r\n    while (snakesCount < 8) {\r\n      const head = Math.floor(Math.random() * 80) + 20; // 20-99\r\n      const tail = i > 0; i--) {\r\n          const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));\r\n          [arr[i], arr[j]] = [arr[j], arr[i]];\r\n      }\r\n      const scrambled = arr.join('');\r\n      // Ensure it's not the same as original\r\n      if (scrambled === word && word.length > 1) return this.scramble(word);\r\n      return scrambled;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  validateMove(move: Move, state: WordBattleGameState): ValidationResult {\r\n    // Anyone can guess at any time in this game mode\r\n    if (!move.data || !move.data.guess) return { valid: false, reason: 'Missing guess' };\r\n    return { valid: true };\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  applyMove(move: Move, state: WordBattleGameState): WordBattleGameState {\r\n    const guess = (move.data.guess as string).toUpperCase().trim();\r\n    \r\n    if (guess === state.currentWord) {\r\n        // CORRECT GUESS!\r\n        // 1. Give Point\r\n        state.scores[move.playerId] = (state.scores[move.playerId] || 0) + 1;\r\n        \r\n        // 2. Check Win Condition (Best of 5 means first to 3?) \r\n        // Or just play 5 rounds. Let's play 5 fixed rounds.\r\n        if (state.round >= state.maxRounds) {\r\n            state.status = 'finished';\r\n            // Determine Winner\r\n            let maxScore = -1;\r\n              winnerId = p.id;\r\n                } else if (state.scores[p.id] === maxScore) {\r\n                    winnerId = 'draw';\r\n                }\r\n            });\r\n            state.winner = winnerId;\r\n        } else {\r\n            // Next Round\r\n            state.round++;\r\n            const newWord = this.getRandomWord();\r\n            state.currentWord = newWord;\r\n            state.scrambledWord = this.scramble(newWord);\r\n        }\r\n    } else {\r\n        // Wrong guess - nothing happens or maybe generic 'miss' event?\r\n        // Ideally we only broadcast state change on correct guess or round end.\r\n        // But for feedback, we might want to return 'invalid' but `applyMove` commits state.\r\n        // So we just return state unchanged.\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    this.state = state;\r\n    return state;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  checkWinner(state: WordBattleGameState): WinnerResult {\r\n      if (state.winner) return { finished: true,                              // Filter by Mode (if specified and not 'mixed')\r\n                                                        if (config.mode && config.mode !== 'mixed' && (room as                                               // 'basic' -> public rooms\r\n                                                        // 'encrypted' -> password rooms (will require input prompt, skip for now or handle)\r\n                                                        // Simplify: Only match public rooms for now unless 'encrypted' is requested specifically\r\n                                                        if (config.securityLevel === 'basic' && (room.accessType !== 'public' || room.requiresPassword)) return false;\r\n                                                        \r\n navigate('/connect');\r\n        });\r\n        return () => {\r\n             socket.off('force_disconnect');\r\n        };\r\n    }, [socket, handleLeaveRoom, navigate]);\r\n\r\n    const [isSearching, setIsSearching] = useState(false);\r\n    \r\n    interface ExtendedLocationState {\r\n        socialIntent?: string;\r\n        socialLanguage?: string;\r\n        interests?: string[];\r\n        connectionType?: 'text' | 'video';\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    const extendedState = location.state as ExtendedLocationState;\r\n    // Retrieve extended state for re-queueing\r\n    const queueInterests = useMemo(() => extendedState?.interests || [], [extendedState?.interests]);\r\n    const queueConnectionType = extendedState?.connectionType || 'video';\r\n\r\n    useEffect(() => {\r\n        if (!socket) return;\r\n        const onMatchFound = ({ roomId: newRoomId }: { roomId: string }) => {\r\n             if (isSearching) {\r\n                 navigate(`/room/${newRoomId}`, { \r\n                     state: { \r\n                         socialIntent: socialState?.socialIntent, \r\n                         socialLanguage: socialState?.socialLanguage,\r\n                         interests: queueInterests,\r\n                         connectionType: queueConnectionType\r\n                     } \r\n                 });\r\n                 setIsSearching(false);\r\n             }\r\n        };\r\n        socket.on('match_found', onMatchFound);\r\n        return () => { socket.off('match_found', onMatchFound); };\r\n    }, [socket, isSearching, navigate, socialState, queueInterests, queueConnectionType]);\r\n\r\n    const handleSocialNext = () => {\r\n        setIsSearching(true);\r\n        leaveRoom(); // Use direct socket leave to avoid feedback modal from useRoom hook\r\n        setTimeout(() => {\r\n             if (socket) {\r\n                 socket.emit('join_random_queue', {\r\n                     intent: socialState?.socialIntent || 'casual',\r\n                     language: socialState?.socialLanguage || 'english',\r\n                     interests: queueInterests,\r\n                     connectionType: queueConnectionType\r\n                 });\r\n             }\r\n        }, 300);\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    const handleSocialReport = () => {\r\n        if (socket) {\r\n             socket.emit('report_user', { roomId, reason: 'User Report' });\r\n             toast.error(\"User Reported\", { description: \"Our safety team has been notified. Interaction logs secured.\" });\r\n        }\r\n        // Client-side leave is handled by the server's force_disconnect response usually,\r\n        // but for perceived speed we can also trigger leave, though waiting for server confirmation is safer to ensure report is sent.\r\n        // We'll rely on the server's 'force_disconnect' or just leave immediately after emit to be safe.\r\n        // Let's leave immediately for user psychological safety.\r\n        handleLeaveRoom();\r\n        navigate('/connect');\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    // --- Speed Psychology (Phase 7): Skeleton Loading ---\r\n    const [showSkeleton, setShowSkeleton] = useState(true);\r\n\r\n    useEffect(() => {\r\n        if (isConnected) {\r\n            // Artificial minimal delay to prevent flicker, but primarily wait for connection\r\n            const timer = setTimeout(() => setShowSkeleton(false), 500); // 500ms progressive reveal\r\n            return () => clearTimeout(timer);\r\n        }\r\n    }, [isConnected]);\r\n\r\n    // Timer Trigger (3 mins)\r\n    useEffect(() => {\r\n        if (!authUser && !isHost && isConnected) {\r\n             const timer = setTimeout(() => {\r\n                 setAuthPromptTrigger('timer');\r\n                 setAuthPromptOpen(true);\r\n             }, 180000); // 3 minutes\r\n             return () => clearTimeout(timer);\r\n        }\r\n    }, [authUser, isHost, isConnected]);\r\n\r\n    // Wrappers for triggers\r\n    const wrappedToggleAudio = useCallback(() => {\r\n        toggleAudio();\r\n        if (!authUser) {\r\n            setGuestInteractionCount(prev => {\r\n                const newCount = prev.mic + 1;\r\n                if (newCount === 3) {\r\n                    setAuthPromptTrigger('microphone');\r\n                    setAuthPromptOpen(true);\r\n                }\r\n                return { ...prev, mic: newCount };\r\n            });\r\n        }\r\n    }, [toggleAudio, authUser]);\r\n\r\n    const wrappedHandleSendMessage = useCallback((e: React.FormEvent) => {\r\n        handleSendMessage(e);\r\n        if (!authUser) {\r\n             setGuestInteractionCount(prev => {\r\n                const newCount = prev.chat + 1;\r\n                if (newCount === 5) { // Prompt after 5 messages\r\n                    setAuthPromptTrigger('chat');\r\n                    setAuthPromptOpen(true);\r\n                }\r\n                return { ...prev, chat: newCount };\r\n            });\r\n        }\r\n    }, [handleSendMessage, authUser]);\r\n\r\n    const wrappedGenerateSummary = useCallback(() => {\r\n        if (!authUser) {\r\n            setAuthPromptTrigger('summary');\r\n            setAuthPromptOpen(true);\r\n            return;\r\n        }\r\n        handleGenerateSummary();\r\n    }, [authUser, handleGenerateSummary]);\r\n\r\n    // Auto-open summary when generated\r\n    useEffect(() => {\r\n        if (meetingSummary) {\r\n            setShowSummaryModal(true);\r\n        }\r\n    }, [meetingSummary]);\r\n\r\n    // Handle room mode configuration\r\n    useEffect(() => {\r\n        if (roomModeConfig?.uiConfig?.hideStatusBanner) {\r\n            setShowStatusBanner(false);\r\n        } else {\r\n            setShowStatusBanner(true);\r\n        }\r\n    }, [roomModeConfig]);\r\n\r\n    // Late Join / Catch Up Prompt\r\n    useEffect(() => {\r\n        // If we are a guest/participant (not host), and we just joined...\r\n        // We can check if there's any existing context. \r\n        // For now, let's just show it if we are not the host to encourage usage.\r\n        // A better check would be seeing if `messages` or `transcripts` exist, but we don't have transcripts in client state until pushed.\r\n        \r\n        // Hide in Social Mode (Random Match)\r\n        if (isConnected && !isHost && !isWaiting && !isSocialMode && !hasShownLateJoinPrompt.current) {\r\n            const timer = setTimeout(() => {\r\n                 if (hasShownLateJoinPrompt.current) return; // Double check inside timeout\r\n                 hasShownLateJoinPrompt.current = true;\r\n                 toast.info(\"Joined Late?\", {\r\n                    description: \"Generate a private summary to catch up on what you missed.\",\r\n                    action: (\r\n                        <Button \r\n                            variant=\"outline\" \r\n                            size=\"sm\" \r\n                            onClick={() => wrappedGenerateSummary({ broadcast: false })}\r\n                            className=\"bg-purple-500/20 border-purple-500/50 hover:bg-purple-500/30 text-purple-200\"\r\n                        >\r\n                            Catch Up\r\n                        </Button>\r\n                    ),\r\n                    duration: 10000,\r\n                });\r\n            }, 4000); // Wait 4s after join\r\n            return () => clearTimeout(timer);\r\n        }\r\n    }, [isConnected, isHost, isWaiting, wrappedGenerateSummary, isSocialMode]);\r\n\r\n    useEffect(() => {\r\n        if (messages.length > prevMessagesLengthRef.current) {\r\n            if (!showChat) {\r\n                setUnreadCount((prev) => prev + 1);\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        prevMessagesLengthRef.current = messages.length;\r\n    }, [messages, showChat]);\r\n\r\n    useEffect(() => {\r\n        if (showChat) {\r\n            setUnreadCount(0);\r\n        }\r\n    }, [showChat]);\r\n    \r\n    // Status banner auto-hide after 2s\r\n    useEffect(() => {\r\n        const timer = setTimeout(() => setShowStatusBanner(false), 2000);\r\n        return () => clearTimeout(timer);\r\n    }, []);\r\n    \r\n    // Keyboard shortcuts with first-use hints\r\n    useEffect(() => {\r\n        const handleKeyPress = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {\r\n            // Don't trigger if typing in input\r\n            if (e.target instanceof HTMLInputElement || e.target instanceof HTMLTextAreaElement) return;\r\n            \r\n            const key = e.key.toLowerCase();\r\n            \r\n            switch(key) {\r\n                case 'm':\r\n                    wrappedToggleAudio();\r\n                    if (!shortcutUsed.has('m')) {\r\n                        setShortcutHint('Press M to mute');\r\n                        setShortcutUsed(prev => new Set(prev).add('m'));\r\n                        setTimeout(() => setShortcutHint(null), 2000);\r\n                    }\r\n                    break;\r\n                case 'v':\r\n                    toggleVideo();\r\n                    if (!shortcutUsed.has('v')) {\r\n                        setShortcutHint('Press V to toggle camera');\r\n                        setShortcutUsed(prev => new Set(prev).add('v'));\r\n                        setTimeout(() => setShortcutHint(null), 2000);\r\n                    }\r\n                    break;\r\n                case 's':\r\n                    handleToggleScreenShare();\r\n                    if (!shortcutUsed.has('s')) {\r\n                        setShortcutHint('Press S to share screen');\r\n                        setShortcutUsed(prev => new Set(prev).add('s'));\r\n                        setTimeout(() => setShortcutHint(null), 2000);\r\n                    }\r\n                    break;\r\n            }\r\n        };\r\n        \r\n        window.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeyPress);\r\n        return () => window.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeyPress);\r\n    }, [wrappedToggleAudio, toggleVideo, handleToggleScreenShare, shortcutUsed]);\r\n    \r\n\r\n\r\n    // Network Quality Feedback (Trust Through Transparency)\r\n    const { quality: netQuality } = useNetworkQuality();\r\n    const prevNetQuality = useRef<NetworkQuality>(netQuality);\r\n\r\n    useEffect(() => {\r\n        if (prevNetQuality.current !== netQuality) {\r\n            if (netQuality === 'poor') {\r\n                toast.warning('Network Unstable', {\r\n                    description: 'We\\'ve optimized audio to keep you connected.',\r\n                    duration: 5000,\r\n                });\r\n            } else if (netQuality === 'offline') {\r\n                toast.error('Connection Lost', {\r\n                    description: 'Attempting to reconnect...',\r\n                    duration: Infinity,\r\n                    id: 'offline-toast', // Prevent duplicates\r\n                });\r\n            } else if (prevNetQuality.current === 'offline') {\r\n                toast.dismiss('offline-toast');\r\n                toast.success('Back Online', { description: 'Connection restored.' });\r\n            }\r\n            prevNetQuality.current = netQuality;\r\n        }\r\n    }, [netQuality]);\r\n    \r\n\r\n\r\n    if (!isConnected || showSkeleton) {\r\n        return <RoomSkeleton />;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    if (isWaiting) {\r\n        return (\r\n            <div className='min-h-screen bg-[#0B0F14] flex items-center justify-center p-6'>\r\n                <motion.div \r\n                    initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}\r\n                    animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}\r\n                    className=\"max-w-md w-full\"\r\n                >\r\n                    <Card className='luxury-card bg-[#11161D] border-white/5 p-10 rounded-[3rem] overflow-hidden relative'>\r\n                        <div className=\"absolute top-0 right-0 p-10 opacity-5\">\r\n                            <Shield className=\"w-48 h-48 -rotate-12 translate-x-20 -translate-y-20\" />\r\n                        </div>\r\n                        <CardHeader className=\"p-0 mb-10 text-center\">\r\n                            <div className=\"w-20 h-20 bg-amber-500/10 border border-amber-500/20 rounded-3xl flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-8 shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(245,158,11,0.2)]\">\r\n                                <Shield className=\"w-10 h-10 text-amber-500\" />\r\n                            </div>\r\n                            <CardTitle className='text-4xl font-black uppercase italic tracking-tighter mb-4'>Security Barrier</CardTitle>\r\n                            <CardDescription className='text-slate-400 font-medium'>\r\n                                Request Transmitted. Waiting for host to accept...\r\n                            </CardDescription>\r\n                        </CardHeader>\r\n                        <CardContent className='p-0 flex flex-col items-center gap-8'>\r\n                            <div className='relative h-20 w-20'>\r\n                                <div className='absolute inset-0 rounded-full border-2 border-white/5'></div>\r\n                                <div className='absolute inset-0 rounded-full border-2 border-amber-500 border-t-transparent animate-spin'></div>\r\n                            </div>\r\n                            <button\r\n                                onClick={handleLeaveRoom}\r\n                                className=\"w-full h-16 rounded-2xl bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-white hover:bg-white/10 transition-all\"\r\n                            >\r\n                                Terminate Session\r\n                            </button>\r\n                        </CardContent>\r\n                    </Card>\r\n                </motion.div>\r\n            </div>\r\n        );\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    const hasScreenShare = localScreenStream || remoteScreenStreams.size > 0;\r\n    const isPresentationMode = hasScreenShare || isPresentingFile || !!youtubeVideoId || gameState?.isActive || isVirtualBrowserActive;\r\n    const currentUser = users.find((u) => u.id === (authUser?.id || effectiveUserId));\r\n    const canShareScreen = isHost || currentUser?.isCoHost || false;\r\n    const localUserName = currentUser?.name || authUser?.user_metadata?.display_name || 'You';\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n    return (\r\n        <div \r\n            className={`min-h-[100dvh] ${modeTheme.bg} text-white flex flex-col overflow-hidden ${modeTheme.selection} selection:text-background font-sans transition-colors duration-700 ${isUltraSecure ? 'select-none pointer-events-auto' : ''}`}\r\n            style={{ '--primary': modeTheme.accentColor } as React.CSSProperties}\r\n            onContextMenu={(e) => isUltraSecure && e.preventDefault()} // Disable right-click in Ultra\r\n        >\r\n            {/* Ultra Security Decryption Modal */}\r\n            <SecurityDecryptionModal \r\n                isOpen={isUltraSecure && !isDecrypted} \r\n                roomId={roomId || 'UNKNOWN'}\r\n                onDecrypt={() => setIsDecrypted(true)} \r\n            />\r\n\r\n            {/* Ultra-Luxury Navbar - 10/10 Plan (LOCKED) */}\r\n            <motion.header \r\n                initial={{ y: -50, opacity: 0 }}\r\n                animate={{ y: 0, opacity: 1 }}\r\n                className={`h-[56px] md:h-[64px] border-b ${modeTheme.borderClass} luxury-glass px-4 md:px-6 flex items-center justify-between shrink-0 z-[100] safe-top relative ${modeTheme.bg}/95 transition-all duration-700`}\r\n            >\r\n                {/* 1.                       />\r\n                        <span className=\"text-[10px] font-bold text-[#EF4444] uppercase tracking-[0.08em] leading-none shadow-red-500/20 drop-shadow-sm hidden <TooltipTrigger asChild>\r\n                                    <button \r\n                                        onClick={() => {\r\n                                            navigator.clipboard.writeText(roomId || '');\r\n                                            toast.success('Room Code Copied', { \r\n                                                description: 'Share // ELO can't go below 0\r\n    const newRank = getRankFromElo(newElo);\r\n\r\n    return {\r\n      newElo,\r\n      change,\r\n      newRank,\r\n    };\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /**\r\n   * Calculate ELO changes for multiple players (e.g., 4-player game)\r\n   * @param players - Array of player ELOs\r\n   * @param rankings - Final rankings (1st, 2nd, 3rd, 4th)\r\n   * @returns Array of ELO results\r\n   */\r\n  calculateMultiplayerELO(\r\n    players: number[],\r\n    rankings: number[]\r\n  ): ELOResult[] {\r\n    if (players.length !== rankings.length) {\r\n      throw new Error('Players and rankings arrays must have same length');\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    const results: ELOResult[] = [];\r\n    const avgElo = players.reduce((sum, elo) => sum + elo, 0) / players.length;\r\n\r\n    for (let i = 0; i < players.length; i++) {\r\n      const playerElo = players[i];\r\n      const ranking = rankings[i];\r\n      \r\n      // Calculate score based on ranking (1st = 1.0, 2nd = 0.66, 3rd = 0.33, 4th = 0.0)\r\n      const score = (players.length - ranking) / (players.length - 1);\r\n      \r\n      const expected = this.calculateExpectedScore(playerElo, avgElo);\r\n      const change = Math.round(this.kFactor * (score - expected));\r\n      const newElo = Math.max(0, playerElo + change);\r\n      const newRank = getRankFromElo(newElo);\r\n\r\n      results.push({\r\n        newElo,\r\n        change,\r\n        newRank,\r\n      });\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    return results;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /**\r\n   * Get ELO range for matchmaking\r\n   * @param elo - Player's ELO\r\n   * @param waitTime - Time spent waiting (in seconds)\r\n   * @returns Min and max ELO for matching\r\n   */\r\n  getMatchmakingRange(elo: number, waitTime: number = 0): { min: number; Elo Similarity (Normalized 0-1)\r\n        const eloDiff = Math.abs(p1.elo - p2.elo);\r\n        const eloScore = Math.max(0, 1 - (eloDiff / 400)); // 400 diff = 0 score\r\n\r\n        // 2. Style Compatibility\r\n        // Aggressive vs Defensive = Good (1.0)\r\n        // Aggressive vs Aggressive = Chaos (0.4)\r\n        // Defensive vs Defensive = Boring (0.4)\r\n        // Balanced = Neutral (0.7)\r\n        let styleScore = 0.5;\r\n        if (p1.dna && p2.dna) {\r\n            const styles = [p1.dna.play_style, p2.dna.play_style].sort();\r\n            if (styles[0] === 'aggressive' && styles[1] === 'defensive') styleScore = 1.0;\r\n            else if (styles[0] === 'aggressive' && styles[1] === 'aggressive') styleScore = 0.4;\r\n            else if (styles[0] === 'defensive' && styles[1] === 'defensive') styleScore = 0.4;\r\n            else styleScore = 0.7;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 3. Toxicity Gap (We want similar toxicity? No, we want low toxicity for good players)\r\n        // But the prompt says \"toxicityGap\". \r\n        // Actually, usually you segregate toxic players. Small gap = they belong together.\r\n        // Let's assume Small Gap = High Score (0-1).\r\n        let toxicityScore = 1.0;\r\n        if (p1.dna && p2.dna) {\r\n            const gap = Math.abs(p1.dna.toxicity_score - p2.dna.toxicity_score);\r\n            toxicityScore = 1 - gap; \r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 4. Prediction Balance (Tilt Prevention)\r\n        // If P1 is tilting, we want an easy opponent (lower Elo).\r\n        // If prediction says P1 tilt > 0.7, boosting score if P2 Elo < P1 Elo.\r\n        let predictionScore = 0.5;\r\n        if (p1.prediction && p1.prediction.tilt_probability > 0.6) {\r\n             // Tilt active: Prefer P2 with Lower Elo (Easy Match intervention)\r\n             if (p2.elo < p1.elo) predictionScore = 1.0; // Good for tilt\r\n             else predictionScore = 0.0; // Bad for tilt\r\n        } else {\r\n             // Normal operation: Equal win probabilities\r\n             // Win prob diff being small is good\r\n             const p1Win = p1.prediction?.win_probability || 0.5;\r\n             const p2Win = p2.prediction?.win_probability || 0.5;\r\n             const winDiff = Math.abs(p1Win - p2Win);\r\n             predictionScore = 1 - winDiff;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // Weighted Sum\r\n        return (\r\n            (eloScore * this.W_ELO) +\r\n            (styleScore * this.W_STYLE) +\r\n            (toxicityScore * this.W_TOXICITY) +\r\n            (predictionScore * this.W_PREDICTION)\r\n        );\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * Simulates finding the best opponent from a pool\r\n     */\r\n    static async findBestMatch(userId: string, currentElo: number, candidates: MatchCandidate[]): Promise<MatchCandidate | null> {\r\n        // Hydrate P1\r\n        const dna = await BrainService.getPlayerDNA(userId);\r\n        const prediction = await BrainService.getPredictions(userId);\r\n        \r\n        const p1: MatchCandidate = { userId, elo: currentElo, dna, prediction };\r\n\r\n        // Check Decision Engine for overrides\r\n        const decision = await DecisionEngine.decide(userId);\r\n        \r\n        let pool = candidates;\r\n\r\n        // Apply Interventions\r\n        if (decision.action === 'TILT_PROTECTION') {\r\n            // Filter pool for easier opponents\r\n            pool = pool.filter(c => c.elo < currentElo);\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // Score all candidates\r\n        const scored = pool.map(c => ({\r\n            candidate: c,\r\n            score: this.calculateMatchScore(p1, c)\r\n        }));\r\n\r\n        // Sort by Score Descending\r\n        scored.sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score);\r\n\r\n        return scored.length > 0 ? scored[0].candidate : null;\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n","usedDeprecatedRules":[]},{"filePath":"C:\\Users\\mahes\\Downloads\\PROJECTS\\COSPIRA_PROJECT\\COSPIRA_MAIN\\src\\services\\MetaEvolutionService.ts","messages":[],"suppressedMessages":[],"errorCount":0,"fatalErrorCount":0,"warningCount":0,"fixableErrorCount":0,"fixableWarningCount":0,"usedDeprecatedRules":[]},{"filePath":"C:\\Users\\mahes\\Downloads\\PROJECTS\\COSPIRA_PROJECT\\COSPIRA_MAIN\\src\\services\\MetaService.ts","messages":[],"suppressedMessages":[],"errorCount":0,"fatalErrorCount":0,"warningCount":0,"fixableErrorCount":0,"fixableWarningCount":0,"usedDeprecatedRules":[]},{"filePath":"C:\\Users\\mahes\\Downloads\\PROJECTS\\COSPIRA_PROJECT\\COSPIRA_MAIN\\src\\services\\OrganizationService.ts","messages":[{"ruleId":"no-console","severity":2,"message":"Unexpected console statement.","line":26,"column":7,"nodeType":"MemberExpression","messageId":"unexpected","endLine":26,"endColumn":20,"suggestions":[{"fix":{"range":[928,973],"text":""},"messageId":"removeConsole","data":{"propertyName":"error"},"desc":"Remove the console.error()."}]},{"ruleId":"@typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any","severity":2,"message":"Unexpected any. This avoids the ambiguous column issue.\r\n    const { data, error } = await supabase\r\n      .from('organization_members')\r\n      .select(`\r\n        role_id,\r\n        organization_roles (\r\n            id, name, is_system_role\r\n        ),\r\n        organizations (\r\n            id, name, slug, domain, status, owner_id, created_at\r\n        )\r\n      `)\r\n      .eq('user_id', user.id);\r\n\r\n    if (error) {\r\n      console.error('Error fetching orgs:', error);\r\n      throw error;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // Flatten and enrich\r\n    const orgs = await Promise.all(data.map(async (member: any) => {\r\n        const org = member.organizations;\r\n        const role = member.organization_roles;\r\n        \r\n        // Fetch permissions for this role\r\n        const permissions = await this.getPermissionsForRole(role?.id); \r\n\r\n        return {\r\n            ...org,\r\n            current_user_role_id: member.role_id,\r\n            role: role?.name, // Backward compat\r\n            current_user_permissions: permissions\r\n        } as Organization;\r\n    }));\r\n\r\n    return orgs;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  static async getPermissionsForRole(roleId: string): Promise<PermissionKey[]> {\r\n      if (!roleId) return [];\r\n      \r\n      const { data, error } = await supabase\r\n        .from('role_permissions')\r\n        .select(`\r\n            permissions ( key )\r\n        `)\r\n        .eq('role_id', roleId);\r\n    \r\n      if (error || !data) return [];\r\n      \r\n      // Extract keys\r\n      return data.map((rp) => rp.permissions?.key).filter(Boolean) as PermissionKey[];\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  static hasPermission(org: Organization, key: PermissionKey): boolean {\r\n      return org.current_user_permissions?.includes(key) || false;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  static async createOrganization(name: string, slug: string): Promise<Organization> {\r\n      const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();\r\n      if (!user) throw new Error('Not authenticated');\r\n\r\n      const { data: org, error: orgError } = await supabase\r\n        .from('organizations')\r\n        .insert({ name, slug, owner_id: user.id })\r\n        .select()\r\n        .single();\r\n      \r\n      if (orgError) throw orgError;\r\n\r\n      // Manual Creation for robustness (Best Effort):\r\n      // If triggers exist (standard), this might fail with 403 or 23505. We suppress it.\r\n      try {\r\n          // A. Create Owner Role\r\n          const { data: roleData } = await supabase\r\n            .from('organization_roles')\r\n            .insert({ organization_id: org.id, name: 'Owner', is_system_role: true })\r\n            .select()\r\n            .single();\r\n\r\n          if (roleData) {\r\n              // B. /**\r\n   * Get Activity Logs (Secure Access)\r\n   */\r\n  static async getActivityLogs(orgId: string): Promise<ActivityLog[]> {\r\n      const { data, error } = await supabase\r\n        .from('activity_logs')\r\n        .select(`\r\n            *,\r\n            actor:actor_id ( email ) \r\n        `) \r\n        .eq('organization_id', orgId)\r\n        .order('created_at', { ---\r\n\r\n  /**\r\n   * Helper: Generate SHA-256 Hash of the token\r\n   */\r\n  private static async hashToken(token: string): Promise<string> {\r\n    const encoder = new TextEncoder();\r\n    const data = encoder.encode(token);\r\n    const hashBuffer = await crypto.subtle.digest('SHA-256', data);\r\n    const hashArray = Array.from(new Uint8Array(hashBuffer));\r\n    return hashArray.map(b => b.toString(16).padStart(2, '0')).join('');\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /**\r\n   * Get all roles available in an organization\r\n   */\r\n  static async getRoles(orgId: string):  if (error) throw error;\r\n      return data as OrganizationRole[];\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /**\r\n   * Invite a user via email (Generates Secure Token)\r\n   * Returns the RAW token (to be sent via email/link). Raw token is NEVER stored.\r\n   */\r\n  static async inviteMember(orgId: string, email: string, roleId: string): Promise<string> {\r\n      // 1. Generate secure random token\r\n      const rawToken = crypto.randomUUID();\r\n      \r\n      // 2. Hash it for storage\r\n      const tokenHash = await this.hashToken(rawToken);\r\n\r\n      // 3. Set expiry (e.g., 7 days)\r\n      const expiresAt = new Date();\r\n      expiresAt.setDate(expiresAt.getDate() + 7);\r\n\r\n      // 4. Create Invite Record (Store HASH)\r\n      const { error } = await supabase\r\n        .from('organization_invites')\r\n        .insert({\r\n            organization_id: orgId,\r\n            email,\r\n            role_id: roleId,\r\n            token_hash: tokenHash, \r\n            expires_at: expiresAt.toISOString(),\r\n            status: 'pending',\r\n            invite_type: 'email'\r\n        });\r\n\r\n      if (error) throw error;\r\n\r\n      // 5. Return RAW token so the UI can construct the link\r\n      // In production, this would arguably be handled by an Edge Function that sends the email directly.\r\n      return rawToken;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /**\r\n   * Get pending invites for an organization\r\n   */\r\n  static async getPendingInvites(orgId: string): Promise<OrganizationInvite[]> {\r\n      const { data, error } = await supabase\r\n        .from('organization_invites' as any)\r\n        .select(`\r\n            *,\r\n            role:role_id ( name )\r\n        `)\r\n        .eq('organization_id', orgId)\r\n        .eq('status', status: 'revoked' })\r\n        .eq('id', inviteId);\r\n      \r\n      if (error) throw error;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /**\r\n   * Check if an invite token is valid and return invite details\r\n   */\r\n  static async checkInviteToken(rawToken: string): Promise<OrganizationInvite | null> {\r\n      // Hash the incoming token to lookup in DB\r\n      const tokenHash = await this.hashToken(rawToken);\r\n\r\n      const { data, error } = await supabase\r\n        .from('organization_invites' as any)\r\n        .select(`\r\n            *,\r\n            organization:organization_id ( name, slug )\r\n        `)\r\n        .eq('token_hash', tokenHash)\r\n        .eq('status', 'pending')\r\n        .gt('expires_at', new Date().toISOString())\r\n        .single();\r\n      \r\n      if (error || !data) return null;\r\n      return data as unknown as OrganizationInvite;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /**\r\n   * Accept an invitation (Atomic Secure Transaction)\r\n   */\r\n  static async acceptInvite(rawToken: string): Promise<void> {\r\n      const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();\r\n      if (!user) throw new Error('Authentication required');\r\n\r\n      // Hash the token to pass to the secure RPC\r\n      const tokenHash = await this.hashToken(rawToken);\r\n\r\n      // Call Atomic RPC function\r\n      const { data, error } = await supabase.rpc('accept_invite_secure', {\r\n          p_token_hash: tokenHash,\r\n          p_user_id: user.id\r\n      });\r\n      \r\n      if (error) {\r\n          console.error('Accept Invite Error:', error);\r\n          throw new Error(error.message || 'Failed to accept invitation');\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      // RPC returns JSONB { success: boolean, error?: string }\r\n      if (data && !(data as any).success) {\r\n          throw new Error((data as any).error || 'Failed to accept invitation');\r\n      }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  // --- ROLE & PERMISSION ENGINE (Phase 3 Enterprise) ---\r\n\r\n  /**\r\n   * Get Master List of Permissions\r\n   */\r\n  static async getAllPermissions(): Promise<Permission[]> {\r\n      const { data, error } = await supabase\r\n        .from('permissions')\r\n        .select('*');\r\n      \r\n      if (error) throw error;\r\n      return data as Permission[];\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /**\r\n   * Create Custom Role (Secure RPC)\r\n   */\r\n  static async createRole(orgId: string, name: string, priority: number): Promise<void> {\r\n      const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();\r\n      if (!user) throw new Error('Not authenticated');\r\n\r\n      const { data, error } = await supabase.rpc('create_role_secure', {\r\n          p_org_id: orgId,\r\n          p_name: name,\r\n          p_priority: priority,\r\n          p_actor_id: user.id\r\n      });\r\n\r\n      if (error) throw error;\r\n      if (data && !(data as any).success) {\r\n          throw new Error((data as any).error || 'Failed to create role');\r\n      }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /**\r\n   * Delete Role (Secure RPC)\r\n   */\r\n  static async deleteRole(roleId: string): Promise<void> {\r\n      const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();\r\n      if (!user) throw new Error('Not authenticated');\r\n\r\n      const { data, error } = await supabase.rpc('delete_role_safe', {\r\n          p_role_id: roleId,\r\n          p_actor_id: user.id\r\n      });\r\n\r\n      if (error) throw error;\r\n      if (data && !(data as any).success) {\r\n          throw new Error((data as any).error || 'Failed to delete role');\r\n      }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /**\r\n   * Update Role Permissions (Atomic Diff)\r\n   */\r\n  static async updateRolePermissions(roleId: string, newPermissionIds: string[]): Promise<void> {\r\n      // 1. Fetch current permissions\r\n      const { data: currentPerms, error: fetchError } = await supabase\r\n        .from('role_permissions')\r\n        .select('permission_id')\r\n        .eq('role_id', roleId);\r\n\r\n      if (fetchError) throw fetchError;\r\n\r\n      const currentIds = currentPerms.map((p: any) => p.permission_id);\r\n      \r\n      // 2. Calculate Diff\r\n      const toAdd = newPermissionIds.filter(id => !currentIds.includes(id));\r\n      const toRemove = currentIds.filter((id: string) => !newPermissionIds.includes(id));\r\n\r\n      if (toRemove.length > 0) {\r\n          const { error: removeError } = await supabase\r\n            .from('role_permissions')\r\n            .delete()\r\n            .eq('role_id', roleId)\r\n            .in('permission_id', toRemove);\r\n\r\n          if (removeError) throw removeError;\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      // 3. Execute Updates (Ideally transactional, here parallel batch for Phase 3)\r\n      // Supabase JS doesn't expose raw transaction block easily without RPC, \r\n      // but we can just run delete then insert. The System Trigger protects critical deletes.\r\n      \r\n      if (toAdd.length > 0) {\r\n          const { error: addError } = await supabase\r\n            .from('role_permissions')\r\n            .insert(toAdd.map(pid => ({ role_id: roleId, permission_id: pid })));\r\n          \r\n          if (addError) throw addError;\r\n      }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  // --- RESOURCE ENGINE (Phase 6 Enterprise) ---\r\n\r\n  /**\r\n   * Get Projects visible to the user (Scoped by RLS)\r\n   */\r\n  static async getProjects(orgId: string): Promise<Project[]> {\r\n      const { data, error } = await counts\r\n      return data.map((p: any) => ({\r\n          ...p,\r\n          teams_count: p.teams?.[0]?.count || 0,\r\n          members_count: p.members?.[0]?.count || 0\r\n      })) as ((stats.avg_match_duration || 0) * stats.total_matches + duration) / (stats.total_matches + 1)\r\n      ),\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    const { data, error } = await supabase\r\n      .from('game_stats')\r\n an intervention.\r\n     */\r\n    static async simulateFeedbackLoop(userId: string, decisionType: string) {\r\n        if (decisionType === 'NONE') return null;\r\n\r\n        // 1. Snapshot Before (Mocked)\r\n        const engagementBefore = Math.random(); // 0-1 score\r\n\r\n        // 2. Simulate User Reaction\r\n        // 70% chance the intervention worked (Reward), 30% it failed\r\n        const worked = Math.random() > 0.3;\r\n        const engagementAfter = worked ? engagementBefore + 0.2 : engagementBefore - 0.1;\r\n\r\n        // 3. Calculate Reward\r\n        let outcome: 'IMPROVED' | 'WORSENED' | 'NEUTRAL' = 'NEUTRAL';\r\n        let reward = 0;\r\n\r\n        if (engagementAfter > engagementBefore + 0.05) {\r\n            outcome = 'IMPROVED';\r\n            reward = 1.0;\r\n        } else if (engagementAfter < engagementBefore - 0.05) {\r\n            outcome = 'WORSENED';\r\n            reward = -1.0;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        console.log(`[RL] Feedback for ${decisionType}: ${outcome} (Reward: ${reward})`);\r\n\r\n        // 4.   }\r\n    static async getTotalTimeSpent(userId: string): Promise<number> {\r\n        try {\r\n            // Try to query room_sessions if it exists\r\n            const { data, error } = await supabase\r\n                .from('room_sessions')\r\n                .select('duration_seconds')\r\n                .eq('user_id', userId);\r\n\r\n            if (error) {\r\n                // Table */\r\n    static async getUltraModeTime(userId: string): Promise<number> {\r\n        try {\r\n            const { data, error } = await supabase\r\n                .from('room_sessions')\r\n                .select('duration_seconds')\r\n                .eq('user_id', userId)\r\n                .eq('room_mode', 'ultra');\r\n\r\n            if (error) {\r\n                console.warn('Error console.error('Exception in getUltraModeTime:', err);\r\n            return 0;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * Calculate security clearance level based on Ultra mode usage\r\n     * Level 1: 0-5 Ultra rooms\r\n     * Level 2: 6-15 Ultra rooms\r\n     * Level 3: 16-30 Ultra rooms\r\n     * Level 4: 31+ Ultra rooms\r\n     */\r\n    static async getSecurityClearanceLevel(userId: string): Promise<number> {\r\n        const ultraSessions = await this.getUltraModeSessions(userId);\r\n\r\n        if (ultraSessions >= 31) return 4;\r\n        if (ultraSessions >= 16) return 3;\r\n        if (ultraSessions >= 6) return 2;\r\n        return 1;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * Get recent activity data for charts (last 7 days)\r\n     */\r\n    static async getRecentActivity(userId: string, days: number = 7): Promise<ActivityDataPoint[]> {\r\n        try {\r\n            const startDate = new Date();\r\n            startDate.setDate(startDate.getDate() - days);\r\n\r\n            const { data, error } = await supabase\r\n                .from('room_sessions')\r\n                .select('created_at, duration_seconds')\r\n                .eq('user_id', userId)\r\n                .gte('created_at', startDate.toISOString())\r\n                .order('created_at', { ascending: true });\r\n\r\n            if (error || !data) {\r\n                console.warn('Error fetching recent activity:', error);\r\n                return [];\r\n            }\r\n\r\n            // Group by date\r\n            const activityMap = new Map<string, { roomsCreated: number; timeSpent: number }>();\r\n\r\n            data.forEach(session => {\r\n                const date = new Date(session.created_at).toLocaleDateString();\r\n                const existing = activityMap.get(date) || { roomsCreated: 0, timeSpent: 0 };\r\n                \r\n                activityMap.set(date, {\r\n                    roomsCreated: existing.roomsCreated + 1,\r\n                    timeSpent: existing.timeSpent + (session.duration_seconds || 0)\r\n                });\r\n            });\r\n\r\n            // Convert to array\r\n            return Array.from(activityMap.entries()).map(([date, stats]) => ({\r\n                date,\r\n                roomsCreated: stats.roomsCreated,\r\n                timeSpent: stats.timeSpent\r\n            }));\r\n        } catch (err) {\r\n            console.error('Exception in getRecentActivity:', err);\r\n            return [];\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * Get all analytics data in ]);\r\n\r\n        return {\r\n            totalRoomsCreated,\r\n            totalTimeSpentSeconds,\r\n            ultraModeSessionsCount,\r\n            ultraModeTimeSeconds,\r\n   /**\r\n     * Format seconds to human-readable time (e.g., \"12h 40m\")\r\n     */\r\n    static formatDuration(seconds: number): string {\r\n        const hours = Math.floor(seconds / 3600);\r\n Date.now() + (ttlSeconds * 1000) : 0;\r\n        this.store.set(key, { val: value, exp });\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    async del(key: string) {\r\n        this.store.delete(key);\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    async incr(key: string) {\r\n        const val = await this.get(key) || 0;\r\n        const newVal = Number(val) + 1;\r\n        this.set(key, newVal);\r\n        return newVal;\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n// Placeholder for future Redis implementation\r\nclass RedisDriver implements StorageDriver {\r\n    // client: RedisClient;\r\n    async get(key: string) { return null; }\r\n    async set(key: string, value: any, ttl?: number) { }\r\n    async del(key: string) { }\r\n    async incr(key: string) { return 0; }\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport class StateLayer {\r\n    // Configurable Driver (Default to Memory for dev)\r\n    private static driver: StorageDriver = new MemoryDriver();\r\n\r\n    static useRedis() {\r\n        console.log(\"🔌 [INFRA] Switching to Redis Driver...\");\r\n        this.driver = new RedisDriver();\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    static async getGame(gameId: string) {\r\n        return this.driver.get(`game:${gameId}`);\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    static async saveGame(gameId: string, state: any) {\r\n        return this.driver.set(`game:${gameId}`, state, 3600); // 1 hour TTL\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    static async cacheUser(userId: string, profile: any) {\r\n        return this.driver.set(`user:${userId}`, profile, 300); // 5 min TTL\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n","usedDeprecatedRules":[]},{"filePath":"C:\\Users\\mahes\\Downloads\\PROJECTS\\COSPIRA_PROJECT\\COSPIRA_MAIN\\src\\services\\infra\\TelemetryService.ts","messages":[{"ruleId":"@typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars","severity":2,"message":"'supabase' is defined but never used.
